items.title: Wasiir Cali Xoosh oo El Hadji Ibrahima Diene kala hadlay fulinta waajibaadka AUSSOM
items.description: Wasiirka Arrimaha Gudaha Somaliya, Cali Yuusuf Cali (Cali Xoosh) ayaa maanta Magaalada Muqdisho kula kulmay Wakiilka Midowga Afrika ee Somaliya ahna Madaxa Taageerada & Xasillinta ee Hawlgalka AUSSOM, Danjire El Hadji Ibrahima Diene. Kulanka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray fulinta waajibaadka Hawlgalka AUSSOM, oo ah mid Dowladda Federaalka lagaga taageero howlaha sugidda amniga iyo la dagaalanka maleeshiyada Al Shabaab. “Wada hadalada ayaa diiradda lagu saaray fulinta waajibaadka AUSSOM, iyadoo xoogga la saarayo xoojinta iskaashiga amniga, xasillinta iyo dib-u-heshiisiinta ee lagu taageerayo mudnaanta ay Soomaalidu hoggaamiso.” Ayaa lagu yiri war gelinkii dambe ee maanta ka soo baxay Taliska AUSSOM. Warka ayaa lagu sheegay “Labada dhinacba waxay carabka ku adkeeyeen muhiimadda ay leedahay isku-dubaridka dhow ee AUSSOM iyo Dowladda Faderaalka Somaliya, si loo horumariyo dadaalada ay Soomaalidu hormuudka ka tahay ee lagu xoojinayo dowladnimada, hay’adaha ammaanka, xasilloonida iyo nabad waarta.” Warka Taliska AUSSOM ayaa lagu sheegay in dhinacyadu ay dib-u-eegis ku sameeyeen horumarka laga gaaray ujeedooyinka la wadaago, mudnaanta la isku waafajinayo, xasillinta ay AUSSOM dalka u joogto iyo xoojinta wada-shaqaynta, si kor loogu qaado dadaalada lagu taageerayo dowlad-dhiska Dowladnimada Somaliya.
items.fullContent: Wasiirka Arrimaha Gudaha Somaliya, Cali Yuusuf Cali (Cali Xoosh) ayaa maanta Magaalada Muqdisho kula kulmay Wakiilka Midowga Afrika ee Somaliya ahna Madaxa Taageerada & Xasillinta ee Hawlgalka AUSSOM, Danjire El Hadji Ibrahima Diene. Kulanka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray fulinta waajibaadka Hawlgalka AUSSOM, oo ah mid Dowladda Federaalka lagaga taageero howlaha sugidda amniga iyo la dagaalanka maleeshiyada Al Shabaab. “Wada hadalada ayaa diiradda lagu saaray fulinta waajibaadka AUSSOM, iyadoo xoogga la saarayo xoojinta iskaashiga amniga, xasillinta iyo dib-u-heshiisiinta ee lagu taageerayo mudnaanta ay Soomaalidu hoggaamiso.” Ayaa lagu yiri war gelinkii dambe ee maanta ka soo baxay Taliska AUSSOM. Warka ayaa lagu sheegay “Labada dhinacba waxay carabka ku adkeeyeen muhiimadda ay leedahay isku-dubaridka dhow ee AUSSOM iyo Dowladda Faderaalka Somaliya, si loo horumariyo dadaalada ay Soomaalidu hormuudka ka tahay ee lagu xoojinayo dowladnimada, hay’adaha ammaanka, xasilloonida iyo nabad waarta.” Warka Taliska AUSSOM ayaa lagu sheegay in dhinacyadu ay dib-u-eegis ku sameeyeen horumarka laga gaaray ujeedooyinka la wadaago, mudnaanta la isku waafajinayo, xasillinta ay AUSSOM dalka u joogto iyo xoojinta wada-shaqaynta, si kor loogu qaado dadaalada lagu taageerayo dowlad-dhiska Dowladnimada Somaliya.

items.title: Experts warn of rising lead risks in Africa’s solar energy boom
items.description: NAIROBI, Kenya (AP) — Years after a lead acid battery recycling plant shut down in Kenya’s coastal city of Mombasa, residents of Owino Uhuru say they are still suffering from lead poisoning, a growing public health risk as Africa’s clean energy boom drives a surge in battery use. Faith Muthama, 40, a mother of four, says her health has never recovered. “Life has never been the same,” she said, wiping away sweat. “I still struggle to do heavy chores as I suffer from breathing difficulties. When I was tested in 2012, I was found with high lead levels in my blood.” Experts warn that similar risks have emerged across Africa as the continent adopts more renewable energy. A February report by the Centre for Global Development, an independent think tank based in Washington and London, warned that the rapid expansion of off-grid solar systems and battery storage, seen as critical to closing Africa’s energy access gap, is driving a sharp increase in demand for battery recycling. Much of that recycling is done in informal or poorly regulated settings. The contamination in Owino Uhuru dates back to 2007, when Kenya Metal Refineries EPZ, a local subsidiary of a company based in Mumbai, India, operated a lead-acid battery recycling plant within the settlement. Residents say toxic waste from the plant, which exported processed lead to India, seeped into the soil and water, causing widespread illness. More than 20 deaths have been linked to the pollution. Although the factory was shut down in 2014, the damage lingers. Lead exposure is linked to neurological damage, reduced cognitive development and long-term health impacts, particularly in children whose brains are still developing. In 2025, Kenya’s Supreme Court awarded about $12 million in damages to about 3,000 residents after they won a class-action lawsuit against the smelting company, a rare legal victory for victims of industrial pollution. But activists say the state has failed to follow through on timely compensation. “I am just waiting for help as I have exhausted all my resources treating myself,” said Alfred Ogulo, 70, a village elder, his speech slightly slurred. At one point, Ogulo said tests showed extremely high lead levels in his blood, leaving him with nerve damage and limited mobility. “I cannot walk without a stick,” he said. “I also suffer from serious chest pain and coughs from the toxic fumes that we breathed in here when the factory was still in operation.” Lead-acid batteries are widely used in many low-income markets because they are cheaper than alternatives like lithium-ion batteries. But safely recycling them requires costly infrastructure that is often lacking. So, informal recyclers often use rudimentary methods that can release lead particles into the air, soil and water. “Off-grid solar could account for a substantial share of batteries entering the recycling stream in Africa,” said Lee Crawford, a senior research fellow at the Centre for Global Development, who reviewed the report. “That’s on top of existing demand from vehicles like cars and motorbikes.” “Safe recycling is expensive and that creates a strong incentive to do it unsafely,” Crawford said, adding that since banning lead-acid batteries is unfeasible, the solution is to make recycling safer. Across Africa and South Asia, studies estimate that between one-third and half of children have elevated blood lead levels, making it one of the most widespread environmental global health risks. In many countries, weak enforcement of environmental regulations compounds the problem. While rules often exist, experts say implementation remains inconsistent. “This is a silent threat,” Crawford said. “It’s often invisible, but it affects health, cognitive development and economic productivity.” The issue extends beyond small informal workshops. Even larger facilities may lack proper controls, while global supply chains for recycled lead can obscure accountability. “There needs to be accountability across the entire supply chain,” Crawford said. Some countries are making progress. South Africa, for example, has introduced producer responsibility systems requiring manufacturers to manage battery recycling, creating a more structured approach. But in many parts of the continent, particularly where batteries are imported rather than produced locally, assigning responsibility remains difficult. International donors are increasingly supporting lithium-ion technologies, which do not carry the same lead-related risks. But lead-acid batteries are expected to remain widely used for years, particularly in off-grid solar systems. It’s a lived reality for residents of Owino Uhuru. “It is sad that the state has ignored prioritizing the compensation payment as ordered by the court,” said Phyllis Omido, who leads the Centre for Justice Governance and Environmental Action (CJGEA) based in Mombasa and helped residents take their case to court. “These monies would have alleviated the current suffering these vulnerable residents are going through.” “Is it fair that we are the ones still chasing justice while the company walks away?” said Mejumaa Hassan Nyanje, 60, as she fought back tears. “Will we all die before justice is served? It feels like we’ve been abandoned, like our lives and our health don’t matter.” Source: AP The post Experts warn of rising lead risks in Africa’s solar energy boom appeared first on WardheerNews .

items.title: ISBEDDELKA ISTARAATIIJIYADEED EE DAGAALKA KA DHANKA AH AL-SHABAAB
items.description: Hordhac Kooban Muddo sannado ah, nooca dagaal ee lagula jiro kooxda araggaxisada ee al-Shabaab (AS) wuxuu u muuqday mid ku kooban difaac, halkaas oo Ciidamada Qalabka Sida ay ku sugnaayeen fariisimo la yaqaanno oo aad mooddo inay ku sugayeen weerarrada kaga imaanaya dhanka argaggaxisada. Habkaasi wuxuu, inta badan, fursad siin jiray in cadowga uu isagu go’aan ka gaaro goorta iyo goobta uu rabo inuu dhibaato ka gaysto. Balse, dhacdooyinkii isdabajoogga ahaa ee bisha Abriil 2026 waxay daaha ka rogeen isbeddel lagu sameeyay qaabdhismeedka amniga iyo istaraatiijiyadda milatariga ee dalka, iyadoo dawladdu ay hadda si buuxda ugu wareegtay nidaamka kahortagga ka hor fulinta. Isbeddelkan cusub wuxuu ka dhigan yahay in ciidamadu aysan kaliya iska difaacin weerarka, balse ay hadda awood buuxda u yeesheen inay fashiliyaan oo ay curyaamiyaan qorshe kasta oo cadowgu maleegayo, isagoo weli ku jira heerka diyaarinta, abaabulka, ama xitaa isagoo jidka ku soo jira. Waa weji cusub oo u dhowaanaya in cadowga lagu dhex baabi’iyo dhufaysyadiisa qarsoon iyo marinnada saadka ee uu u soo maro magaalooyinka, taas oo horseedaysa in gabi ahaanba meesha laga saaro xeeladdii weerarka kediska ahayd ee argaggaxisadu ku faani jirtay. Warbixintan waxay si gundheer u lafaguraysaa dhacdooyinka dhabta ah ee tusaalaha u ah isbeddelkan, iyadoo lagu soo bandhigayo sida sirdoonka iyo cududda fulinta ciidanka oo iskaashanaya ay hadda gacanta sare ugu leeyihiin maamulka xogta iyo amniga dalka. Waxaynu dhex gali doonnaa sidii loo curyaamiyay unugyo muhiim ah oo cadowgu ku tashanayay iyo saamaynta ay guulahan cusub ku yeelan karaan mustaqbalka amniga ee Soomaaliya. Dhacdooyinkii Bisha Abriil Habeennimada 9kii Abriil, 2026, ciidamada amniga ee caasimadda Muqdisho waxay muujiyeen tusaalaha ugu cad ee isbeddelkan. Halkii laga maqli lahaa qarax ama hoobiye ku dhacay gudaha magaalada, ciidanku waxay gacanta ku dhigeen mooto siday shan Hoobiye iyo miinooyin, iyaga oo uu cadowga ku soo qariyay khudaar. Waxaana lagu qabtay agagaarka degmada Deyniile. Xogta shacabka oo lagu lammaaniyay feejignaan sirdoon ayaa u suurtagelisay ciidanka inay qabtaan agabkan dilaaga ah isagoo ku dhex qarsoon jawaano qudaar ah. Tani waxay muujinaysaa in “gaashaanka amniga” ee caasimaddu uu hadda u gudbay heer laga hortago khatarta ka hor intaysan gaarin bartilmaameedkeeda. Taariikhdu markii ay ahayd April 2, 2026, hawlgal sirdoon oo ay fuliyeen Kumaandooska Gorgor iyo ciidanka UPDF, ayaa lagu soo qabtay Salaad Cismaan (Saham) , oo ahaa Taliye Guuto oo khibrad 17 sano ah u leh kooxda AS. Saham waxaa la qabtay isagoo ku jira hawlgal sahan ah oo uu ku indha-indhaynayay fariisimaha degaanka Mubaarak ee gobolka Shabeellaha Hoose. Qabashadiisu waxay dhabarjab ku tahay unugyada kooxda ee Shabeellaha Hoose, maadaama uu ahaa qofka xiriiriya weerarrada aroorta hore lagu qaadi jiray saldhigyada Ciidamada Qalabka Sida. Haddaba, si loo fashiliyo weerar, waa in la ogaadaa ama la qabtaa qofka sahanka u sameeya cadowga. Sidaas awgeed, markii la qabtay sarkaalkii sahanka, waxaa luntay fursaddii ay argaggaxisadu ku fulin lahayd weeraro kedis ah. Gobolka Mudug, gaar ahaan degaanka Tawarmooge, ciidanka qaranka ayaa adeegsaday xeelad kale oo muujinaysa gacanta sare ee dhanka macluumaadka. Halkii la ugaarsan lahaa kooxda oo dhuumaalaysi ku jira, ciidanka ayaa u oggolaaday inay hal meel isugu yimaadaan si loo aqoonsado cududdooda iyo hoggaankooda. Adeegsiga diyaaradaha aan duuliyaha lahayn waxay sahashay in la sugo ilaa bartilmaameedku uu ka noqdo mid dhammaystiran, ka dibna lagu fuliyo duqayn ragaadisay qorshahoodii weerar ee ku waajahnaa degma-xeebeedda qadiimiga ah ee Xarardheere oo ku taalla gobolka Mudug. Tusaalahan wuxuu caddaynayaa in dawladdu hadda leedahay samir istaraatiijiyadeed iyo sirdoon firfircoon oo feejigan oo ay ku burburinayso cududda cadowga iyadoo aan dhiig badan ka daadan ciidanka lugta. Falanqayn Guud Isbeddelkan ma ahan mid ku kooban guulo yaryar, balse waa isbeddel xagga falsafadda dagaalka ah. Haddaba, faa’iidada ka dhalan karta haddii ay dawladdu joogtayso waxaa ka mida: Ka-warhaynta Marinnada: Ciidanku waxay hadda xoogga saarayaan marinnada saadka, si ay u qabtaan hubka ka hor intaanu soo gaarin magaalooyinka. Haddaba haddii la joogteeyo waxaa dhacaysa in cadowga sahayda ku yaraato ilaa uu ka go’. Burburinta Iskuxirka: Qabashada xubnaha ajaanibta ah iyo hoggaankooda (sida Saham) waxay wiiqaysaa xiriirka ka dhexeeya unugyada kooxda ee ku kala baahsan dalka. Kalsoonida Shacabka: Fashilinta weerarrada intaysan dhicin waxay kor u qaadaysaa kalsoonida shacabka, taas oo horseedaysa inay xog badan la wadaagaan ciidamada amniga. Gunaanad Dagaalku wuxuu hadda galay weji cusub oo ku dhisnaan beegsi hufan oo leh hubanti buuxda. Haddii markii hore ciidanku ahaa mid u diyaarsan ka falcelinta weerarada cadowga, maanta waa mid isagu horseed ka ah go’aaminta goobta iyo waqtiga lagu ragaadinayo kooxaha nabaddiidka ah. Guusha dhabta ah ee sirdoonka milatariga Soomaaliya ee sannadkan 2026 waxay ku qotontaa in khatarta la qabto iyadoo aysan weli gaarin bartilmaameedka ay doonayso. Tani waxay muujinaysaa in ciidanku u wareegay weeraro qorshaysan oo lagu ciribtirayo cadowga ka hor inta aysan fursad u helin inay dhibaato gaystaan.

items.title: SOOMAALIYA oo dhoolatus ciidan la sameysay Turkiga, Mareykanka iyo 7 dal oo kale
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Cutubyo ka tirsan Ciidanka Qalabka Sida ee Soomaaliyeed ayaa ka qeyb-galay dhoolatus milateri oo caalami ah, kaas oo ka fhacay dalka Turkiga, iyadoo Soomaaliya ay ka mid tahay dalalka lagu casuumay. War-saxaafadeed ka soo baxay Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga Turkiga ayaa lagu faahfaahiyay dhoolatuskan, waxaana lagu sheegay in ay ka qeyb-galeen dalal dhowr ah oo ay ku jiraan Soomaaliya, Mareykanka, Turkiga, Imaaraadka Carabta, Talyaaniga, Cameroon, Liibiya, Pakistan, Suuriya iyo Sacuudi Carabiya. Dhoolatuskan ayaa lagu tilmaamay mid ka mid ah tababarada milateri ee ugu ballaaran ee ay martigeliso Turkiga, iyadoo diiradda lagu saaray is-dhexgalka iyo iskaashiga ciidamada kala duwan ee dalalka ka qeyb galaya. Intii uu socday dhoolatuska, ciidamada ayaa soo bandhigay xeelado dagaal oo kala duwan, kuwaas oo isugu jira adeegsiga madaafiicda culus, hoobiyeyaasha, tababarka toogashada iyo ku boodista daladaha (baarashuud). Sidoo kale, waxaa qeyb ka ahaa tababaro lagu baranayo baaritaanka iyo ka saarista miinooyinka, kuwaas oo muhiim u ah sugidda amniga goobaha dagaalka iyo ilaalinta shacabka. Cutubyada ka qeyb galaya ayaa sidoo kale qaatay tababaro la xiriira ka hortagga diyaaradaha aan duuliyaha lahayn (diyaarado aan duuliye lahayn), adeegsiga doomaha dheereeya iyo farsamooyin kale oo casri ah oo lagu horumarinayo awoodda ciidamada. Dowladda Turkiga ayaa sheegtay in dhoolatuskan uu isugu jiray mid lagu fuliyay dhulka, badda iyo cirka, iyadoo dhammaan ciidamada ka qeyb galay ay si nabad ah ku dhammeysteen howlaha loo qorsheeyay. Soomaaliya ayaa sanadihii u dambeeyay waday dadaallo ballaaran oo lagu dib u dhisayo laguna casriyeynayo Ciidanka Qalabka Sida, si ay u yeeshaan awood ay ku difaacaan dalka, isla markaana uga qeyb qaataan howlaha iyo tababarada milateri ee caalamiga ah. The post SOOMAALIYA oo dhoolatus ciidan la sameysay Turkiga, Mareykanka iyo 7 dal oo kale appeared first on Caasimada Online .
items.fullContent: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Cutubyo ka tirsan Ciidanka Qalabka Sida ee Soomaaliyeed ayaa ka qeyb-galay dhoolatus milateri oo caalami ah, kaas oo ka fhacay dalka Turkiga, iyadoo Soomaaliya ay ka mid tahay dalalka lagu casuumay. War-saxaafadeed ka soo baxay Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga Turkiga ayaa lagu faahfaahiyay dhoolatuskan, waxaana lagu sheegay in ay ka qeyb-galeen dalal dhowr ah oo ay ku jiraan Soomaaliya, Mareykanka, Turkiga, Imaaraadka Carabta, Talyaaniga, Cameroon, Liibiya, Pakistan, Suuriya iyo Sacuudi Carabiya. Dhoolatuskan ayaa lagu tilmaamay mid ka mid ah tababarada milateri ee ugu ballaaran ee ay martigeliso Turkiga, iyadoo diiradda lagu saaray is-dhexgalka iyo iskaashiga ciidamada kala duwan ee dalalka ka qeyb galaya. Intii uu socday dhoolatuska, ciidamada ayaa soo bandhigay xeelado dagaal oo kala duwan, kuwaas oo isugu jira adeegsiga madaafiicda culus, hoobiyeyaasha, tababarka toogashada iyo ku boodista daladaha (baarashuud). Sidoo kale, waxaa qeyb ka ahaa tababaro lagu baranayo baaritaanka iyo ka saarista miinooyinka, kuwaas oo muhiim u ah sugidda amniga goobaha dagaalka iyo ilaalinta shacabka. Cutubyada ka qeyb galaya ayaa sidoo kale qaatay tababaro la xiriira ka hortagga diyaaradaha aan duuliyaha lahayn (diyaarado aan duuliye lahayn), adeegsiga doomaha dheereeya iyo farsamooyin kale oo casri ah oo lagu horumarinayo awoodda ciidamada. Dowladda Turkiga ayaa sheegtay in dhoolatuskan uu isugu jiray mid lagu fuliyay dhulka, badda iyo cirka, iyadoo dhammaan ciidamada ka qeyb galay ay si nabad ah ku dhammeysteen howlaha loo qorsheeyay. Soomaaliya ayaa sanadihii u dambeeyay waday dadaallo ballaaran oo lagu dib u dhisayo laguna casriyeynayo Ciidanka Qalabka Sida, si ay u yeeshaan awood ay ku difaacaan dalka, isla markaana uga qeyb qaataan howlaha iyo tababarada milateri ee caalamiga ah. items.title: Ujeedka shir ay beesha caalamka qeyb ka tahay oo ka dhacay xafiiska R/wasaaraha
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Ra’iisul Wasaare Ku-Xigeenka Xukuumadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Saalax Axmed Jaamac ayaa maanta shir guddoomiyay madasha isku xirka howlaha ka hortagga fikirka xagjirka ah oo ay soo qaban-qaabisay xarunta TUBSAN. Kulanka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta dadaallada ka hortagga fikirka xagjirka ah iyo dardargelinta wacyigelinta bulshada, gaar ahaan dhallinyarada, si looga hortago marin-habaabinta kooxaha argagixisada. Ra’iisul wasaare ku-Xxigeenka ayaa xusay in xukuumadda Dan-Qaran ay guulo la taaban karo ka gaartay amniga iyo la dagaallanka argagixisada, isagoo adkeeyay muhiimadda sii xoojinta barnaamijyada wacyigelinta bulshada. “Dowladdu waxa ay ka go’an tahay sugidda amniga iyo dhismaha jiil ka madaxbannaan fikirrada xagjirka ah,” ayuu yiri Mudane Saalax Axmed Jaamac. Sidoo kale, wuxuu sheegay in wada-shaqeynta hay’adaha dowladda, bulshada rayidka ah iyo saaxiibada caalamka ay tahay tiirka ugu muhiimsan ee lagu cirib-tiri karo xagjirnimada. Madasha waxaa ka qeyb-galay wakiillo ka socday beesha caalamka iyo hay’adaha daneeya arrimaha ka hortagga xagjirnimada, kuwaas oo bogaadiyay dadaallada dowladda Soomaaliya. Waxaa sidoo kale lagu soo bandhigay qorshayaal cusub oo lagu xoojinayo iskaashiga hay’adaha amniga iyo bulshada si loo kordhiyo wacyigelinta heer deegaan. Ugu dambeyn, mas’uuliyiinta ka qeyb-galay shirka ayaa isku raacay in la dardar-geliyo barnaamijyada dhalinyarada loogu abuuro fursado shaqo iyo waxbarasho si loo yareeyo sababo keeni kara xagjirnimo. Shirkan ayaa qeyb ka ah dadaallada joogtada ah ee Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ay ku xoojinayso amniga iyo xasilloonida dalka. The post Ujeedka shir ay beesha caalamka qeyb ka tahay oo ka dhacay xafiiska R/wasaaraha appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Madaxweyne ku xigeenka oo ka qayb galay munaasibadda xuska …..
items.description: Madaxweyne ku-xigeenka Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ahna ku-simaha Madaxweynaha, Mudane MaxamedCali Aw Cabdi ayaa maanta ka qayb galay munaasibadda Xuska Maalinta Shaqaalaha Aduunka. Munaasibaddan oo lagu qabtay Hall-ka Xarunta Shaqaalaha Dawladda, ayaa waxa ka qayb galay Wasiirka iyo Wasiir ku-xigeenka Wasaaradda Shaqada, Arrimaha Bulshada iyo Qoyska, Gudoomiyaha iyo Gudoomiye ku-xigeenka Xisbiga Waddani, Gudoomiye ku-xigeenka iyo Agaasimaha Guud ee Hay’adda Shaqaalaha Dawladda iyo Marti sharaf kale. Xuska Maalinta Shaqaalaha Aduunka oo Sannadkan hal-ku-dhig looga dhigay “Shaqaalahu waa Laf dhabarta Horumarka Dhismaha Qaranka”, ayaa intii ay socotay Xafladdu, waxa si weyn loogu dheeraaday ahmiyadda ay maalintani u leedahayo guud ahaanba Shaqaalaha Qaranka. Madaxweyne ku-xigeenka Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, ahna ku-simaha Madaxweynaha ayaa munaasibadda ka jeediyey hadal miisaan leh, waxna uu yidhi: “Ugu horrayn, waxa aan idinku hambalyeynayaa Xuska Maalinta Shaqaalaha Aduunka, waxana aan idin leeyahay Sannadkan Sannadkiisa Ilaahay caafimaad qab ha inagu gaadhsiiyo. Munaasibaddan maantu way ka duwan tahay maalmihi hore, oo dalkeennu Aqoonsi Caalamiya ayaynu helnay. Ka Xukuumad ahaan waxa aanu diyaar u nahay in aan Dhallinyarada shaqo abuur u samayno oo aan dhiirigelino cid walba oo hindise la timaada”.

items.title: United States Welcomes Morocco Signing of the Artemis Accords
items.description: United States Welcomes Morocco Signing of the Artemis Accords Office of the Spokesperson The Department of State congratulates Morocco on joining the Artemis Accords. Morocco is the 64th country to sign the Accords to date, pledging its commitment to peaceful space exploration and use. Moroccan Foreign Minister Nasser Bourita signed the Accords on behalf of the Kingdom of Morocco on April 29 at a ceremony in Rabat, Morocco. U.S. Deputy Secretary of State Christopher Landau and U.S. Ambassador to Morocco Duke Buchan III witnessed the signing. Morocco’s signing of the Artemis Accords reflects the strength of the U.S.-Morocco alliance and the extension of that partnership into space, demonstrating Morocco’s commitment to responsible space exploration. The United States and seven other countries established the Artemis Accords in 2020 to serve as a set of practical principles to guide responsible space exploration. Morocco joins the United States and 62 other nations in affirming the Accords’ principles for sustainable civil space activity. The Department of State and NASA lead the United States’ outreach and implementation of the Accords.

items.title: Maxaa looga hadlay kulanka golaha wasiirrada ee Koonfur Galbeed ?
items.description: Baydhabo ( Raxanreeb Online) Golaha Wasiirrada Dowladda Koonfur Galbeed Soomaaliya ayaa maanta yeeshay shir muhiim ah oo uu guddoomiyey Hoggaamiyaha Ku-meel-gaarka ah ee Dowladda Koonfur Galbeed, Mudane Jibriil Cabdirashiid Xaaji. Shirka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xaaladaha guud ee ka jira deegaannada Koonfur Galbeed iyadoo si qoto dheer looga dooday arrimaha amniga, horumarinta mashariicda iyo adeegyada bulshada. Golaha Wasiirrada ayaa sidoo kale si rasmi ah u ansixiyey laba siyaasad oo muhiim u ah horumarka gobolka, kuwaas oo kala ah Siyaasadda Guriyeynta iyo Siyaasadda Fasaxa Dhismaha oo soo diyaarisay Wasaaradda Howlaha guud Labadan siyaasad waxaana loogu talagalay in lagu xoojiyo qorsheynta magaalooyinka, kor loogu qaado tayada dhismayaasha, iyo in la habeeyo nidaamka oggolaanshaha dhismaha. Golaha Wasiirrada ayaa hoosta ka xarriiqay muhiimadda ay leedahay hirgelinta siyaasadaha la ansixiyey, si loo dardargeliyo horumarka iyo bilicda magaalooyinka Koonfur Galbeed Soomaaliya. The post Maxaa looga hadlay kulanka golaha wasiirrada ee Koonfur Galbeed ? appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Daawo: Sanbaloolshe oo si kulul ugu jawaabay wasiir Fiqi
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Agaasimihii hore ee Hay’adda Sirdoonka iyo Nabad-sugidda Qaranka ee (NISA) Mudane Cabdullahi Maxamed Cali (Sanbaloolshe) oo xalay ka qayb-galay kulan ay xubnaha mucaaradka la yeesheen odayaasha dhaqanka ayaa si kulul ugu jawaabay Wasiirka Gaashaandhigga Xukuumadda Soomaaliya, Mudane Axmed Macallin Fiqi. Sanbaloolshe oo ka hadlay magaca uu Fiqi u bixiyay mucaaradka ee “Madasha Calaacalka” ayaa ugu jawaabay in isaguba markii uu ahaa mucaaradka uu calaacali jiray, sidoo kalena uu caaytami jiray, sida uu hadalka u dhigay. Sidoo kale, wuxuu hoosta ka xariiqay in calaacalka mucaaradka uu ka dhashay cabsi ay ka qabaan in dalku galo mugdi, maadaama aan weli laga heshiin nooca doorasho ee dalka ka dhaceysa, iyada oo uu dhamaaday muddo xileedkii dowladda. “Madashaan nin Fiqi la yiraahdo wuxuu u baxshay Madasha Calaacalka, laakiin isaga markii uu mucaaradka ahaa waana caaytami jiray, waana calaacali jiray hadda nimankan waa calaacalaan bis” ayuu yiri Agaasimihii hore ee NISA. Waxaa kale oo uu intaas sii raaciyay “Dowladdu waxay leedahay nimanka mucaaradka hub uruursi ayay ku jiraan waa masabid, taas beddelkeed dowladda iyadaa duulaan ku ah mucaaradka”.. Hadalkan ayaa kusoo aadayo, iyada oo marar badan Wasiir Fiqi uu weerar qaawan ku qaaday xubnaha mucaaradka ee haatan dhaq-dhaqaaqyada ka wada magaalada Muqdisho, isaga oo sheegay inay yihiin kuwa fadhiid ah oo diidan in dalka la gaarsiiyo doorashooyin ay ka qayb-galaan shacabka. “Maxay yiraahdeen nimankii madasha calaacalku doorasho qof iyo cod ah ma rabno, haddii teenna la yeeli waayana waxaanu ka xignaa dagaal. Aniguna waxaan ku leeyahay; haddii aad dagaalamaysid guri aad leedahay ma dumayaa? ganacsi aad leedahay ma joogsanayaa? wiil aad dhashay se ma dhaawacmayaa ama dhimanayaa, adigu furinta ma tagaysaa? Waa maya intuba!”. ayuu horay yiri Wasiirka Gaashaandhigga oo weeraray mucaaradka. Si kastaba, Soomaaliya ayaa haatan wajaheyso xaalad hubanti la’aan ah, iyada oo weli la’isku fahmi la’yahay hannaanka doorashooyinka iyo wax ka beddelka lagu sameeyay dastuurkii 2012-kii, maadaama ay si cad u diideen mucaaradka dalka, Jubbaland iyo Puntland. The post Daawo: Sanbaloolshe oo si kulul ugu jawaabay wasiir Fiqi appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka oo laga joojiyay inay yimaadaan Muqdisho
items.description: Kontoroolada laga soo galo Magaalada Muqdisho ayaa waxaa la dhigay warqad ciidamada lagu faray inaysan soo fasixi karin ciidamada ka tirsan kuwa Xoogga Dalka ee imanaya caasimadda. Wararka ayaa sheegaya in Madaxda Dowladda Federaalka iyo Taliska Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka ay toddobaadkii hore isku afgarteen in la xakameeyo militariga doonaya inay yimaadaan magaalada. Ilo wareedyo ayaa sheegaya in go’aankan uu si gaar ahi u saameynayo ciidamada ka hawlgala Gobolada Shabellaha Hoose iyo Shabellaha Dhexe ama Labada Shabelle oo deris la ah Muqdisho. llo wareedyada ayaa intaasi ku daraya in Ciidanka Polizia Militare iyo Booliska Sida Gaarka ah u tababaran ee Haramcad ee ka hawlgala kontoroolada Muqdisho ay dhowrkii maalmood ee u dambeeyay ay dib u celiyeen askar ka tirsan Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka oo ku soo wajahnaa magaalada. Saraakiisha Militariga Somaliya ayaa kuu sheegaya in askarta kuwooda xitaa fasaxa galay aan la ogoleyn inay xilligan yimaadaan magaalada, haddii aysan taliyeyaashooda ka wadan warqad ay baahi caafimaad ugu imanayaan magaalada. Saraakiishan ayaa ku waramaya in Taliyeyaasha Qaybaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka ay ka reeban yihiin in ay warqad cudurdaar ah u qoraan ciidamada, taas oo adkeynaysa aqbalaadda ay ku soo geli karaan Muqdisho. Dowladda Federaalka ayaa Jimcihii Magaalada Muqdisho ka saartay boqolaal askari oo la geeyay meel ka mid ah Gobolka Shabellaha Hoose, kuwaas oo Sabtidiina loo diray jiidaha hore ee gobolkaasi. Madaxda Dowladda Federaalka ayaa dareen ka qaba in Siyaasiyiinta Mucaaradka ay militariga u adeegsan karaan fad qalalaase, marka aad eegto in laba toddobaad ka hor uu dhamaaday muddo xileedkii Xildhibaanada Labada Aqal ee Baarlamaanka, kan Madaxtooyadana uu laba toddobaad ka harsan yahay. Wararka ayaa sheegaya in Madaxda Dowladda Federaalka iyo Taliska Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka ay toddobaadkii hore isku afgarteen in la xakameeyo militariga doonaya inay yimaadaan magaalada. Ilo wareedyo ayaa sheegaya in go’aankan uu si gaar ahi u saameynayo ciidamada ka hawlgala Gobolada Shabellaha Hoose iyo Shabellaha Dhexe ama Labada Shabelle oo deris la ah Muqdisho. llo wareedyada ayaa intaasi ku daraya in Ciidanka Polizia Militare iyo Booliska Sida Gaarka ah u tababaran ee Haramcad ee ka hawlgala kontoroolada Muqdisho ay dhowrkii maalmood ee u dambeeyay ay dib u celiyeen askar ka tirsan Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka oo ku soo wajahnaa magaalada. Saraakiisha Militariga Somaliya ayaa kuu sheegaya in askarta kuwooda xitaa fasaxa galay aan la ogoleyn inay xilligan yimaadaan magaalada, haddii aysan taliyeyaashooda ka wadan warqad ay baahi caafimaad ugu imanayaan magaalada. Saraakiishan ayaa ku waramaya in Taliyeyaasha Qaybaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka ay ka reeban yihiin in ay warqad cudurdaar ah u qoraan ciidamada, taas oo adkeynaysa aqbalaadda ay ku soo geli karaan Muqdisho. Dowladda Federaalka ayaa Jimcihii Magaalada Muqdisho ka saartay boqolaal askari oo la geeyay meel ka mid ah Gobolka Shabellaha Hoose, kuwaas oo Sabtidiina loo diray jiidaha hore ee gobolkaasi. Muddooyinkanba waxaa dalka ka jiray khilaaf siyaasadeed oo ka dhashay nooca doorasho ee dalka laga qabanayo oo aan heshiis lagu ahayn. items.title: Markabka ugu weyn maraakiibta diyaaradaha xambaara oo hawlgal ka wada Badda Cas
items.description: Sida ay Taliska Dhexe ee Mareykanka uu ku shaaciyey qoraal uu soo dhigay bogga X ‘Markabka Dagaalka ee USS Gerald Ford ayaa “sii wadi doono howlgalladiisa” Badda Cas, iyadoo ay sii socoto hubanti la’aanta ku saabsan xaaladda dagaalka iyo xabad joojinta u dhaxaysa Iiraan iyo Mareykanka. Tan ayaa kusoo aadaysa, iyadoo saaka, dhowr warbaahin oo Mareykan ah oo ay ku jirto Washington Post, ay tebinayeen bilowga geeddi-socodka dib soo laabashada markabka Mareykanka ka dib markii uu dhammeeyay hawlgal dheer oo soconayey 10 bilood.

items.title: Dagaal ka qarxay xaafadda Iskuul Buluusiyo oo sababay dhimasho iyo dhaawac
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Xaalad culus ayaa maanta ka taagan xaafadda Iskuul Buluusiyo ee degmada Xamarjajab, kadib markii saaka ay weerareen ciidamo ka tirsan kuwa dowladda oo burburin ka bilaabay halkaas. Ilo dadka deegaanka ah ayaa sheegay in saaka ay xaafadda gudaha usoo galeen ciidamo ka tirsan kuwa dowladda oo wata gaadiidka dagaalka iyo Cagaf-Cagafyo, waxaana kusoo baxay askar Boolis ah oo qoysaskooda ay dagan yihiin xaafadda, kuwaas oo ay isku dhaceen, kadibna ay israsaaseeyeen. Hooyo kamid ah dadka deegaanka oo la hadashay Shabelle Tv ayaa xaqiijisay in goobta ay ku dhinteen laba carrruur ah, sidoo kalena ay jiraan dhaawacyo soo saaray dad kale oo shacab ah. Waxaa kale oo lasoo wariyay in dhaawac ahaan ay u geeriyootay haweeney Xaamilada aheyd oo goobta laga qaaday. “Laba canug oo saqiir ah waa dhinteen halna waa dhaawac anaga oo ogeyn ayaa xabado nagula furay dadna waa dhinteen kuwana waa dhaawacmeen” ayay tiri hooyo kamid ah dadka deegaanka oo ka warbixisay xaaladda. Sidoo kale waxay intaas ku dartay in dowladooda ay soo weerartay, isla markaana iyaga oo jiifa la dul keenay ciiidan iyo Cagafto, sida ay hadalka u dhigtay. “Dowladda awood ayay noo sheegatay wax aan ku guurnana ma haysano alaabteyda laamiga ayay daadsan tahay” ayay mar kale tiri hooyada. Ma jiro wax hadal ah oo kasoo baxay saraakiisha laamaha amniga iyo maamulka degmada Xamarjajab oo ku aadan xiisadda oo weli laga dareemayo aagga Iskuul Buluusiyo ee magaalada Muqdisho. Xaaladda ayaa haatan kacsan, waxaana socda dhaq-dhaqaaqyo ciidan oo iska soo horjeedo, iyadoo goobta ay tageen saraakiil ka tirsan laamaha amniga. Si kastaba, Dowladda Soomaaliya ayaa meelo badan oo kamid ah caasimada waxay ka sameysay burburin iyadoo maalmihii u dambeeyay cagta la mariyay xaafado ka tirsan degmooyinka Kaaraan iyo Heliwaa ee gobolka Banaadir. The post Dagaal ka qarxay xaafadda Iskuul Buluusiyo oo sababay dhimasho iyo dhaawac appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Imaaraadka oo war soo saaray xilli la sheegay in uu isaga baxayo Jaamacada Carabta
items.description: Abu Dhabi (Caasimada Online) – Dowladda Imaaraadka Carabta ayaa dib u eegis ku samaynaysa doorkii iyo taageeradii ay siin jirtay ururada heer gobol iyo kuwa caalamiga ah ee ay xubinta ka tahay, in kastoo aysan xilligan diyaar u ahayn inay isaga baxdo uroro horleh, sidaas waxaa xaqiijiyay sarkaal ka tirsan Imaaraadka Arbacada, maalin un kaddib markii ay xukuumadda Abu Dhabi ku dhawaaqday inay isaga baxday ururka dalalka dhoofiya shidaalka ee OPEC. Sarkaalkan oo diiday in magaciisa la shaaciyo ayaa tilmaamay in dalkiisu uu guud ahaan qiimayn ku wado faa’iidada iyo waxtarka uu ku qabo ka mid ahaanshaha ururadaas. Hadalkan ayaa ku soo beegmaya xilli ay si weyn u soo baxayeen warar la isla dhexmarayo oo sheegaya in Abu Dhabi ay ka bixi karto ururada kale ee gobolka, oo ay ku jiraan Jaamacadda Carabta iyo Golaha Iskaashiga Khaliijka (GCC). Tani ayaa daba socota go’aankii lama filaanka ahaa ee ay uga baxday ururka OPEC iyo isbaheysiga OPEC+, kaas oo si rasmiga ah u dhaqangelaya 1-da bisha May ee foodda inagu soo haysa. Bixitaanka Imaaraadka, oo ka mid ahaa waddamada ugu wax-soo-saarka badan ururkaas, ayaa sii ballaarinaya khilaafka iyo is-maandhaafka u dhexeeya isaga iyo dalka deriska ah ee Sacuudi Carabiya oo ah awoodda ugu weyn ee hagta dalladda OPEC. Abu Dhabi iyo Riyadh oo horay u ahaa xulufo aan la kala dhex gelin karin, ayaa haatan u muuqda kuwo uu u dhexeeyo xafiiltan hoose oo salka ku haya arrimo dhowr ah, kuwaas oo isugu jira siyaasadda shidaalka, arrimaha juquraafi-siyaasadeed ee gobolka, iyo weliba loollanka loogu jiro soo jiidashada maalgashiga iyo xirfadlayaasha shisheeye. Tallaabooyinkan ayaa qayb ka ah dib-u-qiimayn ballaaran oo ay xukuumadda Abu Dhabi ku samaynayso isbaheysiyadeeda tan iyo markii uu qarxay dagaalka Iiraan. Imaaraadka ayaa dhaliil xooggan u soo jeediyay Golaha Khaliijka, isagoo ku sifeeyay jawaabtoodii ku aaddanayd colaadda mid aad u liidata. “Waa run in dalalka Golaha Iskaashiga Khaliijku ay dhanka saadka iska taageereen, balse marka la eego dhanka siyaasadda iyo milateriga, waxaan aaminsanahay in mowqifkoodu ahaa kii ugu liitay taariikhda,” ayuu yiri Anwar Gargash, oo ah mas’uul sare oo ka tirsan dowladda Imaaraadka, xilli uu Isniintii ka hadlayay shir ka dhacay dalkaas. Wuxuu intaas raaciyay: “Mowqifkaas tabarta yar waxaan ka filayay Jaamacadda Carabta igumana noqon lahayn layaab, balse marnaba kama filayn Golaha Khaliijka aad ayaanan ula yaabay.” Gargash ayaa horay u sii tilmaamay in Imaaraadku uu si qoto dheer u “shaandhayn doono” xiriirradiisa heer gobol iyo heer caalamiba, si uu u ogaado cidda dhabta ah ee la isku halleyn karo, isagoo dib-u-eegistaasna ku lammaaniyay tallaabooyin lagu xoojinayo awoodda dhaqaale iyo maaliyadeed ee dalkiisa. “Madax-bannaanida istaraatiijiyadeed waxay ahaan doontaa doorashada joogtada ah ee Imaaraadka,” ayuu carabka ku adkeeyay. Imaaraadka Carabta oo ah xudun weyn oo ganacsi iyo maaliyadeed oo ku taalla gobolka, isla markaana ka mid ah xulafada ugu muhiimsan ee Washington, ayaa qaatay siyaasad arrimo dibadeed oo geesinimo leh, wuxuuna awood iyo saameyn ballaaran ku yeeshay qaybo badan oo ka mid ah Bariga Dhexe iyo qaaradda Afrika. Kaddib markii ay weeraro kala kulantay dagaalka Iiraan, xukuumadda Abu Dhabi ayaa sii xoojisay xiriirka ay la leedahay Mareykanka iyo Israa’iil, iyadoo Israa’iilna uu heshiis diblomaasiyadeed dhexmaray sanadkii 2020-kii oo loo yaqaan Heshiisyadii Ibraahim (Abraham Accords). Imaaraadka ayaa u arka xiriirka uu la leeyahay Israa’iil mid u ah gacan-qabasho uu ku ballaarin karo saameyntiisa gobolka, isla markaana waddo gaar ah oo uu u sii maro awoodda iyo maamulka Washington. The post Imaaraadka oo war soo saaray xilli la sheegay in uu isaga baxayo Jaamacada Carabta appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Ciidamada oo xoog ku galay xaafadda Waayaabe ee Muqdisho
items.description: Ciidanka Booliska Gobolka Banaadir ayaa saaka xoog ku galay xaafadda Waayaabe ee Degmada Xamar Jajab, si looga barakiciyo qoysaska danyarta ah ee halkaasi degan. Ciidamada oo fulinaya Hawlgalka Cagafta ee lagu burburiyo guryaha la degan yahay ayaa gudaha u galay xaafaddaasi, iyagoo rasaas ridaya, sida ay sheegeen dadka deegaanka. Dadka deegaanka ayaa sheegay inay ku soo tooseen rasaas ka dul dhaceysa oo ciidamada ay furayaan, taasna ay argagax gelisay dhammaan dadka ku dhaqan xaafaddaasi. Ciidamada ayaa dadka deegaanka u sheegay in ay si dhakhsa ah alaabahooda halkaasi uga qaataan, kahor inta aan dhulka lala simin guryaha loo socdo in la burburiyo. Dhanka kale askar ka tirsan kuwa Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka oo maqlay in la galay xaafadda Waayaabe oo qoysas ay u deganaayeen ayaa waxay isku dhaceen Ciidankii Booliska ee hawlgalka burburnta ka waday. Goobjoogeyaasha ayaa sheegay in labada ciidan ay isku adeegsadeen qoryaha daran-dooriga u dhaca, illaa markii dambe ay ku soo baxeen masuuliyiin ka tirsan Dowladda Federaalka. Wararka ayaa intaasi ku daraya in shaqaaqadaasi ay ku dhinteen laba qof oo midi ay haweeney tahay, dhowr kalena ay ku dhaawacmeen. Dadka deegaanka ayaa la arkayay iyagoo alaabahooda madaxa ku wata oo banneynaya xaafadda isku raranka ah ee Waayaabe. Qaar yar oo ka mid ah ayay u suurtagashay in ay helaan gaadiid ay alaabtooda ku qaataan. Qoysaska la barakiciyay ayaa waxay ka cawdeen inaanan la siinin fursad ay xitaa ku guuraan iyo iyaga oo aan haatan garaneyn meel ay afka aadiyaan. Hawlgalka Cagafta oo Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir uu gadaal ka riixayo ayaa dareen dhiilo leh ka abuuray Magaalada Muqdisho.

items.title: Somali Opposition Presents Three Demands to President
items.description: Somali opposition leaders have presented President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud with a set of three core demands to resolve an escalating political crisis, warning that unilateral actions have pushed the country toward a constitutional deadlock. The opposition unveiled the demands following a late-night meeting with traditional elders in Mogadishu, which came just hours after the elders had separately met with the president. The confrontation centers on disputed constitutional changes, claims of land seizures, and disagreements over the electoral process ahead of the May 15 expiration of the government’s mandate. The political standoff follows parliament’s approval of constitutional amendments in early March that extended presidential and parliamentary terms from four to five years, a move the opposition has described as a unilateral power grab. According to the International Crisis Group, the government and opposition remain locked in a struggle over elections due by mid-May, raising fears that a failure to agree could plunge the country into turmoil. “There was only one point of disagreement with President Farmajo: the election. But with President Hassan, we have three: the constitution he changed unilaterally, the land he has taken from the people, and the electoral process,” said lawmaker Abdirahman Abdishakur Warsame, speaking on behalf of the opposition. Warsame also stressed that any modification to the federal system or the constitution would require broad-based consensus, adding that “changing these things in four or five years requires agreement.” The president has consistently defended his agenda, committing to a “one-person, one-vote” electoral system and signaling no intention to back down on constitutional reforms. Political analysts warn that with just weeks remaining before the government’s mandate expires, the window for mediation is rapidly closing. The opposition has now formally requested that traditional elders play a visible role in de-escalating the situation and steering the country through what many describe as its most precarious political transition in years.

items.title: Mucaaradka oo maanta soo bandhigay saddex qodob oo ay ku haystaan Xasan
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Xubnaha mucaaradka dalka oo xalay kulan xasaasi ah la yeeshay odayaasha dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed ayaa kala hadlay tabashadooda, gaar ahaan arrimo ay isku hayaan iyaga iyo madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh. Mucaaradka ayaa shirkan kusoo bandhigay qodobo culus oo dhaliyay khilaafka siyaasadeed ee ka taagan dalka, una baahan in xal waar laga gaaro. Xildhibaan Cabdiraxman Cabdishakuur Warsame oo madasha ka hadlay ayaa shaaca ka qaaday in Xasan Sheekh ay ku haystaan dastuurkii oo la beddelay, dhul boobka socda iyo hannaanka loo wajahayo doorashooyinka dalka. “Farmaajo waxa isku haynay doorashada oo keliya, iskuma haysan dastuur, dhul iyo wax kale toona, laakiin Xasan waxaan isku haynaa dastuurkii oo iskiis u beddelay, dhulkii dadka oo uu qaatay iyo doorashadii dalka”. ayuu yiri Warsame. Sidoo kale wuxuu intaas ku daray haddii wax laga beddalayo nidaamka Federaalka ama dastuurka dalka, loo baahan yahay heshiis wadar ogol ah. “Haddii aan Federalka ka guureyno dad badan oo Soomaaliyeed ayuu dhibaaye ama haddii 4-sano 5-sano lagu baddalayo waxaas oo dhan waxay u baahan yihiin ka heshiin”. ayuu mar kale yiri Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur. Dhanka kale, siyaasiyiinta mucaaradka ayaa odayaasha dhaqanka ka codsaday in ay kaalin muuqata ka qaataan xal u helidda xaaladda taagan, isla markaana ay dalka badbaadiyaan, maadaama uu wajahayo marxalad adag oo u baahan dhex-dhexaadin iyo wada-hadal dhab ah. Odayaasha oo intooda badan Muqdisho u yimid ka qayb-galka caleema saarkii Ugaaska Murusade ayaa habeen hore la kulmay madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh oo isna ay kasoo dhageysteen aragtiidiisa, wuxuuna ku adkeystay in dalka uu ka qabanayo doorashooyin qof iyo cod ah, si looga gudbo doorasho dadban. The post Mucaaradka oo maanta soo bandhigay saddex qodob oo ay ku haystaan Xasan appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Isimmada Soomaaliyeed iyo mucaaradka dowladda oo isku maan-dhaafay xaalka siyaasadda Somalia
items.description: Muqdisho ( Raxanreeb Online) Magaalada Muqdisho, waxaa xalay kulan culus uu ku dhex-maray qaar kamid ah Isimmada Soomaaliyeed iyo mucaaradka dowladda. Kulanka oo ahaa mid xasaasi ah, ayaa lagu lafa-guray xaalada kala guurka ah iyo doorashooyinka iyo sidii Isimmada ay qeyb weyn uga qaadan lahayeen xal u helida xiisada siyaasadda Soomaaliya oo xiligaan mareysa meel xasaasi ah. Inta uu kulanka socday qaar kamid ah Isimmada Soomaaliyeed oo madasha ka hadlay ayaa cabiray dareenkooda ku aadan sida ay uga xun yihiin xaalka cakiran, iyo sida looga xalin karo iyada oo aysan dhicin gacan ka hadal. Ilo wareedyo, ayaa inoo sheegay in mucaaradka ay Isimmada Soomaaliyeed ka dalbadeen in ay joogaan Muqdisho, isla markaana ay ka qeyb qataan xalinta xiisada siyaasadeed, hayeeshee waxaa la sheegay in Isimmada ay labo dhinac u kala safteen, iyaga oo kala tageeray mucaaradka iyo Villa Somalia. Wararkii ugu dambeeyay ee maanta waxa ay sheegayaan in Isimmada Soomaaliyeed ay u kala safreen magaalooyinka Garoowe iyo Nariobi, iyada oo weli xal la gaarin. Sikastaba, arrintan ayaa ku soo beegmeysay xili dalka uu marayo marxalad xasaasi ah, oo mucaaradka iyo dowladda ay ku heshiin waayeen hannaanka kala guurka iyo doorashooyinka dalka. The post Isimmada Soomaaliyeed iyo mucaaradka dowladda oo isku maan-dhaafay xaalka siyaasadda Somalia appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Somali clan leaders step in to mediate election standoff as president’s term nears end
items.description: MOGADISHU (Somaliguardian) – Clan leaders from across Somalia, who gathered in Mogadishu for the coronation of the Murursade Ugas, have stepped into a deepening political standoff, taking on a central role in mediating between President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud and opposition leaders as an election dispute drags on. On Wednesday, the elders met opposition figures at the Jazeera Hotel near Mogadishu’s airport, where they heard detailed accounts of the opposition’s position and key demands over the contentious electoral process and constitutional changes. The clan leaders pledged to relay those concerns directly to the president and said they would work to convene face-to-face talks between both sides in a bid to break the impasse. Their intervention comes as frustration grows over the lack of progress in resolving the crisis, with opposition leaders increasingly doubtful that direct negotiations with the president can yield results. Former president and opposition figure Sharif Sheikh Ahmed has expressed little hope for a breakthrough without outside mediation, effectively handing mediation to traditional leaders. President Mohamud has also called on the elders to help ease tensions, though he has downplayed the severity of the crisis, describing it as a normal feature of democratic systems that will ultimately be resolved. Still, the political stakes are rising as his current mandate is set to expire on May 15. The opposition is pushing for immediate dialogue to establish an election framework acceptable to all parties before that deadline. Mohamud and his allies, however, insist he is entitled to additional year under a newly adopted constitution, a move critics argue was carried out unilaterally and lacks broad consensus. In a separate speech this week, the president reaffirmed his government’s commitment to holding a universal suffrage election across the country. The plan has drawn widespread skepticism, with critics questioning how such a vote could be organized given the government’s limited territorial control, the persistent threat from the Al-Shabaab insurgency in much of southern Somalia, and ongoing tensions with regional administrations in Jubaland and Puntland. Somaliland, for its part, continues to operate independently from the rest of the country. Opposition leaders accuse Mohamud of attempting to extend his rule indefinitely – a scenario they say they will not accept. They have warned that if his term expires without an agreed political settlement, they could move to establish a parallel administration. It remains unclear whether the clan elders can bridge the widening divide and steer the country away from further instability. The outcome could prove pivotal for Somalia, where years of state-building efforts – backed by billions of dollars in international support – now hang in the balance. Conatct us: info@somaliguardian.com

items.title: Wiil uu dhalay Mugabe oo laga soo musaafurinayo dalka Koonfur Afrika
items.description: Maxkmad ku taalla dalka Koonfur Afrika ayaa go’aamisay in dalkiisi lagu celiyo Bellarmine Chatunga Mugabe oo ah wiil uu dhalay. Madaxweynihi hore ee dalka Zimbabwe Robert Mugabe kaas oo lagu helay in uu sannadkan horraantiisi rasaas ka riday guri ay degganaayeen oo ku yaalla magaalada Johannesburg ee dalka Koonfur Galbeed. Warbaahinta CGTN ayaa tibaaxday in sidoo kale ninkan laga doonayo adduun lacageed oo dhan 36 kun oo Dollar oo ganaaxa taas oo la xidhiidha falkii uu ku kacay. Ninkan ayaa ah wiilka ugu yar ubadkii uu ka tegay Robert Mugabe waxana marar kala duwan lagu eedeeyey dembiyo uu galay intii uu ku sugnaa Koonfur Afrika oo ay degeen markii laga tuuray xukunkii waddanka Zimbabwe. Waxa xusid mudan in ay saaxiib aad isugu dhow ahaayeen Robert Mugabe iyo madaxweynihii hore ee Koonfur Afrika Nelson Mandela kuwaas oo soo wada galay halgan ay dalalkooda kaga xoreeyeen caddaankii muddada dheer haystay. The post Wiil uu dhalay Mugabe oo laga soo musaafurinayo dalka Koonfur Afrika appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: GARACAD: Burcad-badeed weerar ku qaaday Saldhig boolis
items.description: Iska horimaad hubeysan oo saaka ka dhacay degmada Garacad ayaa sababay dhimashada hal askari iyo dhaawaca taliyaha saldhigga Jariiban, oo hore u soo noqday taliyaha saldhigga bartamaha Garowe. Dagaalka ayaa dhex maray ciidamada ammaanka Puntland iyo maleeshiyaad hubeysan oo la sheegay inay doonayeen inay la baxaan rag ku eedeysan falal burcad-badeednimo, kuwaas oo ku xirnaa saldhigga. Wararka hordhaca ah ayaa tilmaamaya in sidoo kale ay dhaawacmeen ugu yaraan saddex qof oo kale intii uu socday iska horimaadkan. items.title: Koox cusub oo la ogaaday in ay ka dambeyso weerarada xeebaha Soomaaliya
items.description: Boosaaso (Caasimada Online) – Saraakiil amni ayaa sheegay in weeraradii burcad badeednimo ee dhowaan ka dhacay xeebaha Soomaaliya ay fuliyeen koox cusub oo ah “dambiilayaal fursad-doon ah”, taasi oo ka sii dareysa halis shirkadaha maraakiibta ee caalamka ku keentay khasaare dhaqaale oo u dhigma balaayiin doolar. Falalka burcad badeednimada ayaa faraha ka baxay xeebaha Soomaaliya sanadihii 2000-meeyadii, iyadoo heerkii ugu sarreeyay gaartay sanadkii 2011-kii, markaas oo la diiwaangeliyay boqollaal weerar. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, khatartaas ayaa si weyn hoos loogu dhigay kaddib markii ciidamo badeed oo caalami ah la geeyay gobolka, isla markaana shirkadaha maraakiibta ganacsiga ay la yimaadeen xeelado cusub oo ay isku difaacaan. Balse toddobaadkii la soo dhaafay gudahiisa, waxaa la afduubtay markabka shidaalka qaada ee HONOUR 25 iyo markabka sibirka qaada ee SWARD, waana dhacdooyinkii ugu waaweynaa ee la diiwaangeliyo bilooyin kaddib. Sida uu wakaaladda wararka ee AFP u xaqiijiyay sarkaal ka tirsan laamaha amniga ee maamul-goboleedka Puntland ee waqooyi-bari Soomaaliya, qabsashada markabka SWARD waxaa fuliyay koox ka hawlgasha degmada xeebeedka Garacad. Deegaankan ayaa aad uga xiga dhanka koonfureed xarumaha caadiga ah ee ay burcad badeeddu ku xooggan yihiin, kuwaas oo u badan saddexda magaalo xeebeed ee Xaafuun, Bandar Beyla iyo Eyl, halkaas oo la rumeysan yahay in la geeyay markabka kale ee shidaalka ee HONOUR 25. Kooxdan cusub ayaa inta badan ka kooban “dhallinyaro miyi ah” oo ka soo jeeda deegaan “hubku uu iska dhex yaallo”. Waxaa dhaq-dhaqaaqooda kiciyay saboolnimo baahsan iyo caro ay ka qabaan kalluumeysiga sharci-darrada ah ee ay wadaan maraakiib shisheeye oo ka kala yimid dalalka Shiinaha, Yemen, Iiraan iyo waddamo kale. “Ku dhawaad qof kasta oo ku nool deegaankan waa sabool, qof kastana waa hubeysan yahay. Kalluumeysiga sharci-darrada ah, gaar ahaan kan ay wadaan maraakiibta xaaqaha ah, ayaa xaaladda ka dhigaya mid ka sii darta,” ayuu sarkaalku u sheegay AFP. Wuxuu intaas raaciyay digniin adag oo ah in haddii aan kooxahan laga hortagin, ay isku beddeli karaan ururro la mid ah kuwa haatan dagaalka kula jira dowladda, isagoo ula jeeday kooxaha Islaamiyiinta ah ee Al-Shabaab iyo Daacish oo sanado badan dagaal kula jira dowladda federaalka Soomaaliya. Sida inta badan looga bartay Soomaaliya, xaaladda ayaa waxaa sii murjinaya arrimaha qabiilka, oo udub dhexaad u ah siyaasadda iyo bulshada dalka. Sarkaal labaad oo ka tirsan amniga Puntland ayaa u sheegay AFP in kooxda afduubatay markabka SWARD ay dhammaantood ka soo wada jeedaan hal beel iyo jifo hoose. Tani ayaa si weyn u adkeynaysa tallaabooyin kasta oo ay dowladda iyo laamaha amnigu qaadi karaan, maadaama loo arki karo weerar ka dhan ah qabiilkaas guud ahaan. “Raggan saaran markabka waxay ka soo jeedaan jifooyin gaar ah, taas oo ka duwan jifada uu ka soo jeedo madaxweynaha Puntland. Sidaas darteed, haddii aan weerar qaadno oo qaar ka mid ah ay waxyeello soo gaarto, waxay horseedi kartaa dilal aano qabiil ah oo dhexmara dadka deegaanka,” ayuu sharraxay sarkaalka labaad. Wuxuu xusay in wada-xaajoodku uu yahay xalka ugu wanaagsan ee lagu dajin karo xaaladdan xasaasiga ah, inkastoo uu qiray in arrintaasi ay sidoo kale gacan siinayso dhiirigelinna u tahay burcad badeedda. Ilaa iyo haatan, xukuumadda Puntland ayaan wax war-saxaafadeed ah ka soo saarin afduubyadan. Dhanka kale, falanqeeye Jethro Norman oo ka tirsan Machadka Daraasaadka Caalamiga ah ee Denmark (Danish Institute for International Studies), ayaa sheegay in soo rogaal-celinta burcad badeednimadu ay dhibaatooyin waqti dheer ah u keeni karto bulshada deegaanka. Isagoo la hadlayay AFP ayuu yiri: “Qoysaska qaar ayaa laga yaabaa inay helaan lacag caddaan ah oo muddo gaaban ah. Balse saameynta ballaaran ee ka dhalanaysa ayaa ah inuu kor u kaco qiimaha cuntooyinka dibadda laga keeno iyo gaar ahaan shidaalka, in caqabad lagu noqdo kalluumeysiga sharciga ah, iyo in suurtagal ay tahay in la kordhiyo ciidamada badda ee shisheeye ee ilaaliya xeebaha, taas oo dhib ku noqonaysa nolosha caadiga ah ee badda.” Norman ayaa carabka ku adkeeyay in beesha caalamku ay tahay inay wax badan ka qabato sidii looga hortagi lahaa maraakiibta shisheeye ee sida sharci-darrada ah uga dhex kalluumeysta gobolka, kuwaas oo caro iyo uur-kutaallo ku abuuraya dadka deegaanka. “Puntland waxay sanado badan qeylo-dhaan ka muujinaysay kalluumeysiga sharci-darrada ah ee shisheeyaha,” ayuu yiri falanqeeyaha. Wuxuu hadalkiisa ku soo gaba-gabeeyay: “Illa iyo inta beesha caalamku ay si toos ah dhaqaale iyo qalab ugu taageerayso hay’adaha Puntland ee ilaaliya xeebahan, xal lagama gaari doono khatarta taagan xilligan iyo dhaqaalaha siyaasadeed ee quudiya dhibaatadan.” The post Koox cusub oo la ogaaday in ay ka dambeyso weerarada xeebaha Soomaaliya appeared first on Caasimada Online .

Maxaa kasoo kordhay baaritaanka ay wadeen FBI ka waday Minneapolis ?
items.description: Minneapolis ( Raxanreeb Online) Xarunta caanka ah ee Quality Learing Center” ee ay leeyihiin Soomaalida Minneapolis ayaa la xiray gabi ahaanba Arbacadii, maalin ka dib markii FBI ay weerartay xarunta xanaanada carruurta iyo ilaa 20 ganacsiyo kale, iyadoo qayb ka ah baaritaan lagu sameeyay eedeymo ku saabsan khiyaano adeeg bulsho oo ballaaran oo ka dhacay Minnesota. Magacii iyo astaantii gaancsiga ayaa laga fujiyey, waxaana lagu beddelay calaamad digniin u ah booqdayaasha in kamaradaha amniga ee la isticmaalayo. Dhowr kubbadood oo hula ah oo xariijimo leh ayaa lagu arkay meesha qashin-qubka gaari yar oo kuwa caruurta ahna waxaa laga helay meesha ay gawaaridu istaagto. Qof ilaaliye ah oo ka shaqeyn jiray aaggaas ay xannaanadu ku taallo ayaa sheegay inuusan waligiis arkin carruur galeysa gudaha xarunta, taasoo xirnayd bishii Janaayo sida ku cad diiwaanka gobolka. Waqtigaas, qof degan oo ku noolaa meel u dhow ayaa sheegay inaysan “waligood” carruur ku arkin halkaa, warbaahinta the Post ayaa sheegtay in ay xaruntu ula muuqatay mid mashquul badan. The post Maxaa kasoo kordhay baaritaanka ay wadeen FBI ka waday Minneapolis ? appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Taliyaha Ciidanka Uganda oo ka hadlay Soomaaliya iyo hadal muran dhaliyay
items.description: Muhoozi Kainerugaba, oo ah Taliyaha Ciidanka Uganda isla markaana ah wiilka Madaxweynaha Yoweri Museveni, ayaa qoraal uu ku baahiyay baraha bulshada ku sheegay in diiraddiisu ay tahay Soomaaliya, isagoo xusay in “codka Uganda la ixtiraami doono gudaha Soomaaliya hadda iyo mustaqbalka.” Muhoozi ayaa sidoo kale sheegay in khilaafkii uu hore ula yeeshay Turkiga uusan si toos ah ula xiriirin dalkaas, balse uu carrabka ku adkeeyay xiriirka uu la leeyahay Soomaaliya, isagoo ku tilmaamay “walaalo dhab ah.” Hadalka ayaa si weyn u soo jiitay dareenka, maadaama Uganda ay door muhiim ah ka ciyaarto arrimaha amniga Somalia, gaar ahaan howlgalada nabad ilaalinta ee Midowga Afrika. Si kastaba, weedhaha ku saabsan in “codka Uganda la ixtiraamo Soomaaliya” ayaa dhalisay falcelin kala duwan. Qaar ka mid ah falanqeeyayaasha ayaa u arka hadalka mid muujinayay doorka Uganda ee taageerada amniga Soomaaliya, halka kuwo kalena ay ka muujinayaan walaac ku saabsan sida uu u taabanayo madaxbannaanida dalka. Muhoozi Kainerugaba ayaa hore hadallo muran dhaliyay uga sheegay Turkey, kuwaas oo la xiriiray arrimo siyaasadeed iyo awood muujin. Wuxuu marar kala duwan baraha bulshada ku qoray hadallo loo fasirtay dhaleeceyn iyo isbarbardhig taariikhi ah, taasoo dhalisay falcelin gudaha iyo dibaddaba ah. Si kastaba, hadalkiisii ugu dambeeyay ayuu ku caddeeyay in khilaafkaas uusan si toos ah ugu jeedin Turkiga, balse uu diiradda saarayo xiriirka iyo doorka Uganda ee Somalia.

items.title: Nin ku dhashay Soomaaliya oo lagu eedeeyay weerar tooriyeeyn ah oo ka dhacay London
items.description: Waxaa ka dhacay magaalada London, gaar ahaan xaafadda Golders Green ee waqooyiga magaalada, weerar tooriyeeyn ah oo lagu dhaawacay laba nin oo ka tirsan bulshada Yuhuudda, falkaas oo ay boolisku ku tilmaameen mid argagaxiso. Labada nin ee la weeraray ayaa lagu kala magacaabaa Shilome Rand oo 34 jir ah iyo Moshe Shine oo 76 jir ah. Waxaa goobta lagu siiyay daryeel degdeg ah ka hor inta aan loo gudbin isbitaalka, halkaas oo la sheegay in xaaladdoodu ay hadda deggan tahay. Booliska ayaa gacanta ku dhigay nin 45 jir ah oo haysta dhalashada Britain, kuna dhashay Soomaaliya, kaas oo looga shakisan yahay inuu ka dambeeyay weerarka. items.title: DF oo wafdi culus u dirtay degmada Luuq + Ujeedka
items.description: Luuq (Caasimada Online) – Wafdi ka socda Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa maanta gaaray degmada Luuq ee gobolka Gedo, halkaas oo si diiran loogu soo dhaweeyay, iyaga oo ka bilaabay dhaq-dhaqaaqyo culus. Wafdigan ayaa waxaa horkacayo wasiir ku ixgeenka wasaaradda waxbarashada Soomaaliya, Cabdirashiid Maxamed Ducaale oo deegaan doorashadiisu tahay magaaladaas, isaga oo ka warbixiyay socdaalkiisa. Ducaale ayaa shaaca ka qaaday in kulamo wada tashi ay ka bilaabi doonaan Degmada Luuq, kuwaas oo ku aadan xaaladda murugsan ee ka taagan degmadaas, maadaama muddo dheer ay ka taagan tahay colaad xooggan. Wasiirka ayaa xusay inay nabadeyn ka sameyn doonaan degmada, isla markaana ay isku keeni doonaan waxgaradka deegaanka, si bulshada ay ugu noolaato amni buuxa. “Waxaan u nimid inaan wada tashano maadaama deegaan doorashadeyda ay halkan tahay dalkana isbeddelo iyo caqabado ay ka jiraan, muhiimadda waa inaan talooyin wadajir ah gaarno kuwaas oo qaas u ah degmadan Luuq, gaar ahaan colaaddii sokeeye ee magaaladan muddada labada sano kasoo jirtay aadna waa uga xumahay”. ayuu yiri Wasiir Cabdirashiid Maxamed Ducaale. Waxaa kale oo uu ku daray “Intaan ka badan dagaal sokeeye ma socon karo dadkan gogoshooda waa nabad, haddii nabad la waayo horumar ma jiraayo”. Dhanka kale, waxa uu hoosta ka xariiqay inay dib boorka uga jafi doonaan ciidamada Xoogga dalka ee jooga halkaasi, si ay u howlgalaan una helaan xuquuqaad uu sheegay inay muddo dheer ka maqan yihiin. “Arrinta labaad waxay tahay inaan dib u habeyn ku sameyno ciidamada qalabka sida ee halkan jooga oo uu dayac badan ka jiro xaquuq la’aan ay hayso si walba haku dhacdo arrimahaan qaaska u ah degmadan ayay kamid yihiin”. ayuu mar kale yiri wasiir ku xigeenka wasaarada waxbarashada. Luuq ayaa kamid ah degmooyinka Gedo ee ay muddada dheer colaadaha ka jiraan, waxaana haatan halkaas ka howlgala ciidamo ka tirsan kuwa Xoogga iyo maamul taabacsan dhanka Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya. Marar badan ayay magaaladu ka dhaceen dagaal beeleedyo iyo kuwa kale u dhexeeyay dowladda Soomaaliya iyo maamul-goboleedka Jubbaland. The post DF oo wafdi culus u dirtay degmada Luuq + Ujeedka appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Muqdisho oo marti-gelisay shirka sirdoonka dalal dhowr ah
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed, S/Guuto Ibraahim Maxamed Maxamuud ayaa si rasmi ah u daah-furay shirka Taliyayaasha Talisyada Sirdoonka ee waddamada ku mideysan Ururka Bulshada Bariga Afrika (EAC), kaas oo soconaya 29–30 April 2026. Shirkan ayaa diiradda lagu saarayaa xaaladaha amni ee waddamada Bariga Afrika iyo guud ahaan gobolka, iyadoo la isla falanqeynayo caqabadaha jira iyo xoojinta iskaashiga dhinaca sirdoonka. Mas’uuliyiinta ka qeyb-galaya shirka ayaa la filayaa inay si qoto dheer uga wada-hadlaan khataraha amni ee sii kordhaya, oo ay ka mid yihiin argagixisada iyo dambiyada abaabulan. Taliyaha ciidanka xoogga dalka ayaa khudbaddiisa kaga hadlay xaaladda amni ee Soomaaliya iyo tan guud ee gobolka, isaga oo muujiyay muhiimadda ay leedahay iskaashi dhow oo dhinaca sirdoonka ah. Sidoo kale, wuxuu xusay horumarka laga gaaray dib-u-habaynta iyo soo kabashada ciidanka xoogga dalka Soomaaliyeed, taas oo qeyb ka ah dadaallada lagu xoojinayo amniga dalka. Taliyaha ayaa carrabka ku adkeeyay in wadamada gobolka ay u baahan yihiin inay si wadajir ah uga hortagaan khataraha amni ee isa soo taraya. S/Guuto Ibraahim Maxamed Maxamuud ayaa ugu dambeyntiina u mahad-celiyay wufuudda ka soo qeyb gashay shirka, isagoo u rajeeyay in uu noqdo mid miro-dhal ah oo laga gaaro natiijooyin wax ku ool ah. The post Muqdisho oo marti-gelisay shirka sirdoonka dalal dhowr ah appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Qofkii geystay weerarkii lagu qaaday Yuhuudda London uu la sheegay inuu “ku dhashay Soomaaliya”
items.description: Labo nin oo Yahuud ah ayaa lagu tooriyeeyay deegaanka Golders Green ee waqooyiga magaalada London, waxaana falkan ay boolisku ku tilmaameen mid argagaxiso. Raggan oo magacyadooda lagu kala sheegay Shilome Rand, 34 jir ah, iyo Moshe Shine, oo 76 jir ah, ayaa lagu daweeyay goobta, xaaladdooduna hadda way wanaagsan tahay ayagoo isbitaalka ku jira, sida uu sheegay Booliska. Nin 45 jir ah oo haysta dhalashada Britain, kuna dhashay Soomaaliya, ayay booliisku ku rideen aaladda Tas er-ka si ay u qabtaan ka hor inta aan la xirin isaga oo looga shakisan yahay isku day dil, sida ay ciidamadu sheegeen. Eedeysanaha ayaa hadda xiran. Raiisel wasaare Sir Keir Starmer ayaa sheegay in “weerarkaas Yuhuud naceybka” oo ah kii ugu dambeeyay ee xariga UK – uu ahaa “mid aad looga naxo”, isaga oo intaa raaciyay: “Weerarada ka dhanka ah bulshadeenna Yuhuuda waa weeraro ka dhan ah Britain”. Booliska ayaa sheegay in saraakiishooda ay jawaabeen 11:16 xilliga Ingiriiska Arbacadii ka dib markii ay heleen warbixino sheegaya in dadka lagu tooriyeeyay Highfield Avenue, taasoo ka baxsan Golders Green Road. Tuhmanaha ayaa sidoo kale isku dayay in uu tooriyeeyo saraakiishii ka qeybgashay qabashadiisa, sida uu booliska sheegay, laakiin midna ma dhaawacmin. Fiidiyow lagu wadaagay baraha bulshada ayaa u muuqda mid muujinaya xilliga la xiray. Laba askari ayaa la arkayay ayagoo u soo dhawaaday ninka ka hor inta uusan mid Taser ku ridin. Ninkan ayaa u muuqda in uu shay af badan laabta ku qabsaday labada gacmood, waxaana saraakiisha iyo dad goob joog ahaa ay damceen in ay ka qaadaan. Waxaa la arkayaa askarta oo ninkan dhowr jeer madaxa ka laadayey. Booliiska ayaa la wacay 08:50 xilliga Ingiriiska ee talaadadii ciwaanka ku yaal wadada Great Dover Street ee Southwark, ka dib markii tuhmanaha la sheegay in uu ku lug lahaa gacan ka hadal uu la galay qofka guriga deggan. Xigashada Sawirka, Reuters Ninkan ayaa u muuqda in uu shay af badan laabta ku qabsaday labada gacmood, waxaana saraakiisha iyo dad goob joog ahaa ay damceen in ay ka qaadaan. Waxaa la arkayaa askarta oo ninkan dhowr jeer madaxa ka laadayey. Booliska ayaa sii daayey muuqaalka dhacdadan oo laga soo qaaday kamaradaha jirkooda ku xiran, kuwaas oo la maqlayo iyagoo ku qeylinaya si isdaba joog ah oo ay ugu baaqayaan tuhmanaha inuu “dhulka dhabbacdo” ka hor inta aan Taser lagu ridin, ka dibna uusan “Middida tuurin”. “Eedeysanaha waa uu diiday in uu gacmahiisa tuso, waxa uu ahaa mid rabshad badan, waxa uuna sii waday khatar cad” ayey yiraahdeen ciidanka oo intaa ku daray in tuhmanaha uu sii watay isku daygii uu ku doonayay in uu ku weeraro oo uu tooriyeeyo askarta markii ay gacanta ku soo dhigeen. Taliyaha Booliska Sir Mark Rowley ayaa ammaanay geesinimada askarta, isagoo yiri: “Kuwaani ma aysan ahayn saraakiil hubeysan, waxayna ka baqeen inuu sito walxaha qarxa”. Tuhmanuhu waxa uu lahaa taariikh rabshado halis ah iyo arrimo caafimaadka maskaxda ah, ayuu ku daray hadal uu ka jeediyay goobta galabnimadii Arbacada. Booliska ayaa markii dambe sheegay in saraakiishu ay baaritaan ka wadeen ciwaan ku yaal koonfurta bari ee London. Dembi-baarayaasha ayaa rumeysan in isla eedeysanaha uu ku lug lahaa dhacdo hore oo aaggaas ka dhacday. Booliiska ayaa la wacay 08:50 xilliga Ingiriiska ee talaadadii ciwaanka ku yaal wadada Great Dover Street ee Southwark, ka dib markii tuhmanaha la sheegay in uu ku lug lahaa gacan ka hadal uu la galay qofka guriga deggan. Ben Grossnass, oo ah isku-duwaha hay’adda samafalka, ayaa BBC u sheegay in mutadawiciintu “ay ahaayeen kuwii ugu horreeyay ee goobta gaara”. “Tani waa in ay noqotaa xilli u baahan waxqabad macno leh oo ka yimaada hay’ad kasta, bulsho kasta, hoggaamiye kasta iyo qof kasta oo hufan oo waddankeena ah,” ayuu yiri. War qoraal ah oo uu soo saaray xafiiska ra’iisul wasaaraha Israa’iil Benjamin Netanyahu ayaa lagu sheegay in “aanay ku filneyn in laga hortago dhibaatadan” weerarrada London. Weerarkii Arbacada ayaa yimid ka dib markii ay dhaceen dhacdooyin isdaba joog ah bilihii la soo dhaafay oo lala beegsaday bulshooyinka Yuhuuda. Ilaa lix weerar ayaa la diwaan geliyey tan iyo horraantii Oktoobar ee sannadkii hore. Duqa magaalada London Sir Sadiq Khan ayaa sheegay inuu “ka carooday oo ka naxay ” in dadka Yuhuudda ah ay “noloshooda ku nool yihiin cabsi”. Boqor Charles III ayaa isna “ka walaacsanaa” weerarka Arbacadii, sida uu sheegay afhayeen u hadlay Qasriga Buckingham. Mar la weydiiyay in dowladdu ay wax ku filan ka sameyneyso ilaalinta Yuhuudda Ingiriiska, Sir Keir wuxuu sheegay inuu doonayo “inuu eego ammaanka la xoojiyay” oo uu kordhiyo maalgelinta horay loogu yaboohay ilaalinta bulshooyinka Yuhuudda. Hadalka ra’iisul wasaaraha ayaa yimid kadib markii uu shir guddoomiyay shir degdeg ah oo looga hadlayay weerarka. Hoggaamiyaha xisbiga muxaafidka Kemi Badenoch ayaa sheegtay in hadda ay jirto “cudud ka dhan ah dadka Yuhuudda ah” oo noqotay “xaalad degdeg ah oo qaran”. Hogaamiyaha isbadal doonka UK Nigel Farage ayaa isna sheegay in weerarku uu ahaa “wax laga naxo”. Hogaamiyaha xisbiga Liberal Democrats Sir Ed Davey ayaa sheegay in dhacdadani ay tahay mid laga naxo wuxuuna ugu baaqay dowlada inay ka hortagto naceybka meel kasta oo uu ka muuqdo. Zack Polanski, oo ah hogaamiyaha xisbiga Green Party ayaa weerarka ku tilmaamay mid aad looga naxo, waxa uuna sheegay in uu niyadda ku hayo dhibanayaasha, qoysaskooda iyo cid kasta oo weerarka uu gilgilay. Source bbc somali

War qoraal ah oo uu soo saaray xafiiska ra’iisul wasaaraha Israa’iil Benjamin Netanyahu ayaa lagu sheegay in “aanay ku filneyn in laga hortago dhibaatadan” weerarrada London. Weerarkii Arbacada ayaa yimid ka dib markii ay dhaceen dhacdooyin isdaba joog ah bilihii la soo dhaafay oo lala beegsaday bulshooyinka Yuhuuda. Ilaa lix weerar ayaa la diwaan geliyey tan iyo horraantii Oktoobar ee sannadkii hore. Duqa magaalada London Sir Sadiq Khan ayaa sheegay inuu “ka carooday oo ka naxay ” in dadka Yuhuudda ah ay “noloshooda ku nool yihiin cabsi”. Boqor Charles III ayaa isna “ka walaacsanaa” weerarka Arbacadii, sida uu sheegay afhayeen u hadlay Qasriga Buckingham. Mar la weydiiyay in dowladdu ay wax ku filan ka sameyneyso ilaalinta Yuhuudda Ingiriiska, Sir Keir wuxuu sheegay inuu doonayo “inuu eego ammaanka la xoojiyay” oo uu kordhiyo maalgelinta horay loogu yaboohay ilaalinta bulshooyinka Yuhuudda. Hadalka ra’iisul wasaaraha ayaa yimid kadib markii uu shir guddoomiyay shir degdeg ah oo looga hadlayay weerarka. Hoggaamiyaha xisbiga muxaafidka Kemi Badenoch ayaa sheegtay in hadda ay jirto “cudud ka dhan ah dadka Yuhuudda ah” oo noqotay “xaalad degdeg ah oo qaran”. Hogaamiyaha isbadal doonka UK Nigel Farage ayaa isna sheegay in weerarku uu ahaa “wax laga naxo”. Hogaamiyaha xisbiga Liberal Democrats Sir Ed Davey ayaa sheegay in dhacdadani ay tahay mid laga naxo wuxuuna ugu baaqay dowlada inay ka hortagto naceybka meel kasta oo uu ka muuqdo. Zack Polanski, oo ah hogaamiyaha xisbiga Green Party ayaa weerarka ku tilmaamay mid aad looga naxo, waxa uuna sheegay in uu niyadda ku hayo dhibanayaasha, qoysaskooda iyo cid kasta oo weerarka uu gilgilay. Source bbc somali

items.title: Muxuu yahay shirka ay DF uga qeyb-gashay Addis Ababa?
items.description: Addis Ababa (Caasimada Online) – Wasiirka Wasaaradda Deegaanka iyo Isbeddelka Cimilada ee Soomaaliya, Bashiir Maxamed Jaamac ayaa magaalada Addis Ababa uga qeyb-galay kalfadhiga SDG6 ee madasha ARFSD12. Wasiir Bashiir io khudbad muhiim ah ka jeediyay shirka ayaa si qoto dheer uga hadlay saameynta isbeddelka cimilada iyo helitaanka biyo nadiif ah. Wasiirka ayaa sheegay in isbeddelka cimiladu uu si toos ah u wiiqayo helitaanka kheyraadka biyaha, gaar ahaan dalalka Afrika ee horeyba u wajahaya caqabado badan oo dhinaca deegaanka ah. Wuxuu tilmaamay in kororka magaalooyinka iyo ballaarinta degmooyinka ay kordhiyeen baahida loo qabo biyo nadiif ah, taas oo cadaadis hor leh saartay ilaha biyaha ee jira. Sidoo kale, Wasiirku wuxuu xusay in maalgelin la’aantu ay si weyn u curyaamisay dadaallada lagu horumarinayo kaabayaasha biyaha, taas oo sii adkeynaysa xaaladda sugnaanta biyaha. Wuxuu carrabka ku adkeeyay in sugnaanta biyaha ay tahay arrin si dhow ugu xiran horumarka waara, isla markaana ay muhiim u tahay caafimaadka, waxbarashada iyo dhaqaalaha bulshada. Wasiirku wuxuu intaas ku daray in helitaanka biyo nadiif ah uu muhiim u yahay awoodda bulshooyinka ee la qabsiga isbeddelka cimilada, maadaama biyuhu yihiin laf-dhabarta nolosha. Dhanka kale, wuxuu hoosta ka xariiqay baahida loo qabo in la xoojiyo adkeysiga bulshada si ay uga hortagaan khataraha ka dhasha isbeddelka cimilada. Ugu dambeyntiina, wasiirka ayaa ku baaqay in la dardar-geliyo iskaashiga caalamiga ah iyo maalgelinta, si loo xaqiijiyo yoolka SDG6 ee ah in dhammaan bulshooyinku helaan biyo nadiif ah oo la isku halleyn karo. The post Muxuu yahay shirka ay DF uga qeyb-gashay Addis Ababa? appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Democracy by Deception: How Mogadishu’s Votes Were Rendered Meaningless Overnight
items.description: By Ahmed A. Yusuf In a move that has stunned citizens, legal observers and further deepened Somalia’s escalating political crisis, the Governor of Banadir Region, Hassan Mohamed (Muungaab), has unilaterally appointed district commissioner s for Shangaani, Dayniile, and Gubadley, directly overriding a recently established electoral framework that was supposed to mark a turning point toward democratic local governance. The decree, issued late last night, did not merely fill administrative vacancies. It effectively dismantled the very premise of the one-person, one-vote local elections that the Federal Government had championed as a historic step toward democratization in Mogadishu. On December 25, 2025, the government organized a widely publicized local election in the capital, electing 390 council members across various districts. The process, which consumed millions of dollars and drew significant domestic and international attention, was presented as the foundation of a new era—one in which local communities would finally exercise direct authority over their own governance structures. Those councils were formally sworn in on April 18, 2026, amid official declarations that Mogadishu had entered a new democratic phase. But barely weeks later, that narrative is already unraveling. Under Article 22(3) of Somalia’s Electoral Law, the authority to select district commissioners in Banadir Region is explicitly reserved for the elected local councils themselves. The provision is unambiguous: commissioners are to be chosen from within the councils, ensuring that leadership emerges from a representative and participatory process. Governor Muungaab’s latest decree does the exact opposite. Not only did he bypass the councils entirely, but he also removed some of their members and replaced them with individuals who were never elected in the first place. In doing so, he has reduced the councils—freshly elected and ceremonially empowered—to little more than symbolic bodies with no real authority. The contradiction is as stark as it is alarming. A government that invested heavily financially and politically in promoting local elections has now, through executive fiat, stripped those same institutions of their core function. The implications are clear: the elections were never about devolving power. They were about manufacturing legitimacy. This directly contradicts what the government has been advocating to the public. It cannot ask citizens to vote, swear in their representatives, and then promptly render those representatives irrelevant. That is not governance—it is theater. The timing of the move has only intensified suspicions. With the federal administration of Hassan Sheikh Mohamud approaching the end of his term, decisions emerging from Villa Somalia are increasingly being viewed through the lens of political survival rather than institutional integrity. The appointment of district commissioners, particularly in areas such as Dayniile and Gubadley—comes amid reports of heightened security maneuvering and internal political tensions. Critics argue that control over district leadership is being consolidated not to improve governance, but to secure leverage in an increasingly volatile political landscape. If that is the case, then the local councils elected at great cost have been reduced to collateral damage in a broader power struggle. The financial dimension adds another layer of controversy. Millions of dollars were spent organizing the December elections, with substantial unconfirmed support from international partners who viewed the process as a milestone in Somalia’s long-delayed democratization. That investment is now being openly questioned. Beyond the immediate legal violations, the episode raises deeper questions about the credibility of Somalia’s political reform agenda. For years, the federal government has promised a transition from indirect clan-based selection to universal suffrage. The Mogadishu local elections were supposed to serve as a pilot—a proof of concept that broader electoral reforms could be implemented nationwide. Instead, they have become a case study in how quickly such reforms can be reversed. The message sent to the public is difficult to ignore. Citizens were encouraged to vote, told their voices mattered, and assured that their participation would shape local leadership. Yet when those votes produced institutions capable of exercising authority, that authority was swiftly curtailed. The result is not merely disillusionment. It is a profound erosion of trust. And trust, once broken, is not easily restored. For the elected council members themselves, the situation is particularly stark. Sworn in less than two weeks ago, they now find themselves sidelined by decisions taken without consultation or accountability. Their mandate, conferred by the electorate, has been effectively overridden by decree. This raises a fundamental question that cuts to the heart of Somalia’s political trajectory: if elected bodies can be so easily bypassed, what incentive remains for citizens to participate in future elections? The broader implications extend well beyond Mogadishu. Somalia’s federal system relies on a delicate balance between central authority and local autonomy. Actions that undermine elected institutions in the capital risk setting a precedent that could ripple across federal member states, further complicating an already fragile political landscape. At a moment when the country faces mounting security challenges, economic pressures, and an impending electoral transition, the need for credible, functioning institutions has never been greater. Yet what is unfolding in Mogadishu suggests the opposite trend: the hollowing out of institutions. What is clear, is that the gap between rhetoric and reality has rarely been so wide. The government promised democracy. What it delivered, is strikingly different. And for a city that was told it had finally taken ownership of its political future, the question now is painfully simple: was the vote ever meant to matter? Ahmed A. Yusuf Email: aayuusuf44@gmail.com The post Democracy by Deception: How Mogadishu’s Votes Were Rendered Meaningless Overnight appeared first on WardheerNews .

items.title: The 16-Day Countdown: Political Survival or a Dangerous Gamble?
items.description: Mogadishu (WDN) — With just about two weeks remaining in office, the administration of President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud is facing escalating allegations of preparing a high-risk security operation in Mogadishu, one that critics warn could push the capital toward internal confrontation. In a development that has taken many observers by surprise, a security meeting at the presidential palace reportedly approved a plan for the Federal Government to seize weapons held in the Gubadley and Dayniile districts ahead of May 15, 2026, the constitutional end of the current federal administration mandate. The timing of parallel administrative changes has only intensified scrutiny. On the same day, the Mayor of Mogadishu, Muungaab, has appointed new district commissioners for both Gubadley and Dayniile, positions now filled by officers drawn directly from the security services. These new appointments by Mayor Muungaab contradicts the recently publicized local council elections that was held in Mogadishu on December 2025, which Villa Somalia claimed had ended the practice of appointing city councils and mayors. The move is widely viewed as part of President Hassan’s broader effort to tighten operational control in areas identified as strategically sensitive. Further raising the stakes, sources indicate that plans are underway to remove General Saney Abdulle, commander of the 3rd Brigade of the 12 April Division of the Somali National Army. His dismissal, insiders say, would be swiftly followed by an operation to disarm both him and the forces under his command. At the center of the unfolding crisis, General Saney is now reportedly viewed within government circles as a potential defector, someone who could align with opposition factions amid intensifying political tensions. According to multiple accounts, the anticipated disarmament operation is being preceded by a systematic clearing of potential resistance. Officials believed to be sympathetic to the general have been removed from key posts. In one of the most notable moves, the former district commissioner of Gubadley was abruptly dismissed and replaced by a military officer, Colonel Yusuf Muse Guure—an appointment seen as laying the groundwork for an impending security operation. The restructuring appears to extend beyond civilian administration. Sources suggest that elements within local police command structures are also being reshuffled or sidelined, clearing the path for what insiders describe as a fast-tracked operation unfolding against a rapidly closing political deadline. The convergence of these moves, security planning, administrative reshuffles, and targeted removals has alarmed political analysts, who see a dangerous intersection of political uncertainty and military maneuvering. In a city already burdened by deep political divisions, the prospect of an armed operation targeting a senior military commander raises the risk of escalation within the security apparatus itself, where loyalties remain complex and, at times, fragmented. “This is not just a security measure,” a political observer told WardheerNews. “It carries all the hallmarks of a political gamble with potentially explosive consequences.” As the clock ticks down on the administration’s final days, Mogadishu is increasingly on edge—caught between a government moving decisively to assert control and a political environment growing more resistant to unilateral action. Whether this moment passes as a contained operation or spirals into a broader crisis may depend on decisions made in the coming days. WardheerNews The post The 16-Day Countdown: Political Survival or a Dangerous Gamble? appeared first on WardheerNews .
