Afhayeenka Pentagon-ka, George Little, ayaa xaqiijiyay in ciidamada badda ee Mareykanka ee loo yaqaanno SEAL Team Six (DEVGRU) ay weerar dhanka badda ah ku qaadeen guri ku yaalla xeebta Baraawe si ay nolosha ugu soo qabtaan Cikrama, balse waa uu ka badbaaday ka dib markii dagaal culus uu dhex maray ciidanka iyo ilaaladiisii.  Sidoo kale, sanadkii 2014 , ciidanka ammaanka Kenya ayaa weerar ku qaaday guri ku yaalla Mombasa ka dib markii ay heleen xog sheegaysa inuu halkaas joogo, balse wuu ka baxsaday goobta kahor intaanay ciidanku soo gaarin, waxaana halkaas lagu dilay nin kale oo isaga lagu khalday. Ugu danbayntii, Cikrama ma uusan ka badbaadin oo kaliya weerarrada shisheeyaha, balse wuxuu, sidoo kale, ka badbaaday khilaafaadka dhiigga ku daatay ee gudaha kooxda AS. Sida ay sheegeen ilo wareedyo xog-ogaal ah, bishii Abriil 2014 , isaga oo maraya degaanka Haawaay ee Gobolka Shabeellaha Hoose, waxaa lala beegsaday qarax miino oo ay soo abaabuleen ciidanka Amniyaadka ee hoostaga amiirkii hore ee Kooxda AS, Axmed-Godane, ka dib markii uu soo kala dhex galay khilaaf dhanka istiraatiijiyadda ah, balse qaraxaasna waa uu ka badbaaday. Badbaadadiisa joogtada ah iyo awooddiisa dhuumashada ayaa ka dhigtay mid kamid ah dadka ugu muhiimsan ee ay sirdoonka caalamku doondoonayaan, isagoo madaxiisa la saaray 2014 lacag dhan $3 milyan ilaa $5 milyan oo doollar. Falanqayn: Maxay ka Dhigan Tahay Xarigga Cikrama? Xarigga Cabduqaadir Cikrama, wuxuu calaamad u yahay mid ka mid ah isbeddellada ugu waaweyn ee ka dhex dhacay hoggaanka sare ee kooxda al-Shabaab, tobankii sano ee u danbaysay. Maadaama uu Cikrama ahaa sarkaalka ugu muhiimsan ee iskuxira kooxda al-Shabaab iyo garabyada caalamiga ah, xariggiisu ma ahan oo kaliya khasaare dhanka hoggaanka ah, waase dhabarjab weyn oo ku yimid kalsoonidii iyo nidaamkii sirdoonka ee argaggaxisada al-Shabaab. Xaqiiqda ah in “Amniyaadka” ay qabteen sarkaal miisaankaas leh, isagoo ku sugan meel ka baxsan fariisimihiisii rasmiga ahaa, waxay xaqiijinaysaa in kooxda argaggaxisada ah ee al-Shabaab ay hadda gashay marxalad kalashaki gudaha ah oo aad u sarraysa. Farriintii Mahad Karataay ee billowgii Maarso 2026, ee ku saabsanayd dhex-galka sirdoonka, waxay ahayd hordhaca rasmiga ah ee ololahan sifaynta ah. Karataay waxa uu si cad u qirtay in sirdoonka dawladda iyo kuwa caalamiga ah ay si weyn u dhex-galeen unugyada kooxda, taas oo la micno ah in al-Shabaab ay hadda u arkaan xubnahooda ugu aqoonta badan—gaar ahaan kuwa qurbaha ka yimid sida Cikrama—inay yihiin dad u nugul inay la shaqeeyaan sirdoonnada shisheeye. Cikrama, oo ku hadla lix luuqadood isla markaasna yaqaan habfikirka reer Galbeedka, waxa uu hadda dhibbane u noqday isla aqoontii markii hore kooxda loogu soo dhoweeyay. Marka la eego dhanka hawlgallada, xarigga Cikrama waxa uu curyaaminayaa awoodda al-Shabaab ee qorsheynta weerarrada ka dhaca dibadda. Cikrama waxa uu ahaa “maskaxda” ka danbaysay jabhadaha Kenya ka hawlgala iyo weerarradii Westgate iyo Gaarisa; haddaba, maqnaanshihiisu waxay wiiqi doontaa xiriirka kooxdu la leedahay unugyada muhaajiriinta iyo qorsheynta weerarrada casriga ah. Tani waxay dhalin kartaa in kooxdu ay dib ugu laabato weerarrada fudfudud ee gudaha, iyadoo luminaysa saamayntii ay ku lahayd gobolka iyo caalamka. Ugu danbayntii, haddii Cikrama loo dilo eedeymo la xiriira tanaasul ama sirdoon, waxay fariin cabsi leh u diraysaa dhalinyarada kale ee qurbaha ka yimid ee kooxda ka tirsan. Tani waxay horseedi kartaa in kooxdu u kala qaybsanto garabyo iska shaki qaba, taas oo fududayn karta inay sii dumaan unugyada sirdoonka iyo kuwa hawlgallada ee kooxda. Badbaadadii yaabka lahayd ee Cikrama uu kaga soo dhex baxay weerarradii SEAL Team Six iyo miinooyinkii Axmed-Godane, waxay u muuqataa inay hadda ku dhammaan rabto gacanta saaxiibbadiisii uu muddada dheer u soo shaqaynayay, taas oo muujinaysa in khatarta ugu weyn ee hoggaanka al-Shabaab ay hadda ka dhex jirto gudahooda.

items.title: Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibedda Somaliland oo la kulmay orodyahan Maxamed Ordaaye
items.description: Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibedda Somaliland oo qaabilay Maxamed Ordaaye Wasiirka Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibedda Somaliland, Cabdiraxmaan Daahir Aaden , oo uu la socday Agaasimaha Guud Mohamed Abdirahman Hassan , ayaa maanta xarunta wasaaradda ku qaabilay Maxamed Axmed Aw Cali, oo loo yaqaan Ordaaye. Maxamed ayaa caan ku noqday muuqaallo orod ah oo uu ku baahiyo baraha bulshada, kuwaas oo si degdeg ah u faafay, isla markaana soo jiitay indhaha warbaahinta caalamka. Waxaa xitaa la sheegay in ay la soo xiriireen shirkado iyo kooxo ciyaareed oo magac leh. Wasiirka ayaa ku ammaanay dadaalka iyo adkeysiga uu muujiyay, isagoo xusay in Ordaaye uu tusaale u yahay dhalinyarada, gaar ahaan dadka qaba baahiyaha gaarka ah. Wuxuu sidoo kale u sheegay in dowladda iyo wasaaraddu ay garab taagan yihiin. Dhankiisa, Ordaaye ayaa muujiyay farxad uu ku tilmaamay mid weyn, isagoo sheegay inuu si sharaf leh u matali doono dalkiisa meel kasta oo uu tago, islamarkaana uu rajeynayo in la sii xoojiyo taageerada dhalinyarada leh hibada.

items.title: Madaxweyne Hore Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo oo Baaq Midnimo Qaran iyo Xoojinta Doorka Odayaasha Dhaqanka Jeediyey
items.description: WAR SAXAAFADEED Abriil 26, 2026 Waxaan codkayga ku biirinayaa baaqii shalay uu soo jeediyey Madaxweynihii hore Shariif Sheekh Axmed uuna taageeray Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud mar ay ka hadlayeen madashii caleema-saarka Ugaas Cabdirisaaq Ugaas Cabdullaahi Ugaas Xaashi oo ahayd madal muujisay baahida ay Soomaalidu u qabto midnimo iyo wadahadal. Sidoo kale, waxaa xusid mudan kaalintii iyo dadaalladii uu hore u muujiyey Madaxweynihii hore Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo ee la xiriiray adkeynta midnimada iyo wadajirka ummadda Soomaaliyeed. Baaqa Madaxweynayaasha waxaa uu salka ku hayey kaalinta ay duubabka dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed ee ku kulmay caasimadda dalka ay ka qaadan karaan xal u helidda ismari-waaga siyaasadeed ee dalka ka jira. Haddaba waxaan sidoo kale halkan baaq uga gudbinayaa duubabka Soomaaliyeed inay u istaagaan gudashada waajibkooda, ayna kaalin mug leh ka qaataan sidii loo gaari-lahaa xal siyaasadeed oo looga badbaado dib u laabasho siyaasadeed iyo dagaallo sokeeye. Ugu dambeyn, waxaan markale madaxda siyaasadda dalka muxaafid iyo mucaarad ugu baaqayaa inaan odayaasha dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed siinno kaalin dhab ah oo ay ka qaadan karaan geeddi socodka dowlad dhiska Soomaaliya, bacdamaa ayagu ahaayeen kuwii dhisay hannaankii lagu unkay jamhuuriyadda saddexaad ee Soomaaliya.

items.title: Dowladda Soomaaliya oo Xabsiga Dhigtay Maamulkii Shirkadda Favori iyo Xoghayntiisa
items.description: Dowladda Soomaaliya oo xabsiga dhigtay Maamulihii Shirkadda Favori iyo xoghayntiisa Muqdisho – Ilo ku dhow hay’adaha amniga ayaa xaqiijiyay in dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ay xabsiga dhigtay Maamulihii shirkadda Favori LLC iyo xoghayntiisa, kadib markii lagu eedeeyay hab-dhaqan shaqo oo ay si weyn uga cabanayeen qaar ka mid ah shaqaalaha iyo dadka adeegsada adeegyada garoonka. Xariggan ayaa ka dhacay magaalada Muqdisho, iyadoo la sheegay in baaritaanno hordhac ah lagu hayo eedeymo la xiriira maamulka iyo qaabka ay ula dhaqmi jireen shaqaalaha ka howlgala garoonka diyaaradaha Aden Adde International Airport . Cabashooyin hore oo la xiriira shaqaalaha Wararka la helayo ayaa tilmaamaya in muddooyinkii u dambeeyay ay jireen cabashooyin isdaba joog ah oo ka imaanayay shaqaalaha, kuwaas oo ku saabsan cadaadis shaqo iyo hab maamul oo aan raalli laga ahayn. Ilo xog-ogaal ah ayaa sheegaya in tallaabadan ay timid kadib kormeer iyo baaritaan ay wadeen hay’adaha dowladda, inkastoo aan weli si rasmi ah loo shaacin natiijada kama dambaysta ah. Kiiskan ayaa la sheegay inuu saameyn ku yeelan karo qaar ka mid ah adeegyada garoonka caalamiga ah ee Muqdisho, maadaama shirkaddu ay ka mid ahayd kuwa maamula adeegyo muhiim ah. Si kastaba, saraakiisha dowladda ayaa la filayaa inay soo saaraan warbixin faahfaahsan maalmaha soo socda, si loo caddeeyo xaaladda rasmiga ah.

items.title: Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka BJFS iyo Wafdi uu Hoggaaminayo oo Si Diirran loogu Soo Dhoweeyey Baydhabo
items.description: GUDDOOMIYAHA GOLAHA SHACABKA EE BJFS OO SI DIIRRAN LOOGU SOO DHOWEEYEY MAGAALADA BAYDHABO Baydhabo, Soomaaliya – 26 Abriil 2026 — Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe), iyo wafdi ka kooban wasiirro iyo xildhibaanno ayaa gaaray Baydhabo. Wafdiga ayaa waxaa garoonka diyaaradaha ee Shaati Guduud kusoo dhoweeyey hoggaamiyaha ku-meel-gaarka ah ee Dowlad Goboleedka Koonfur Galbeed, wasiirro, xildhibaanno ka tirsan maamulka, odayaasha dhaqanka, iyo qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada magaalada Baydhabo. Guddoomiyaha ayaa hadal uu ka jeediyay garoonka diyaaradaha uga mahadceliyey masuuliyiinta iyo bulshada sida diirran ee ay u soo dhoweeyeen, isagoo xusay in muddada uu ku sugan yahay Baydhabo uu kulamo kala duwan la qaadan doono maamulka iyo qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada Koonfur Galbeed. Ugu dambeyn, Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ayaa tilmaamay in dhawaan deegaanada Dowlad Goboleedka Koonfur Galbeed ay ka dhici doonto doorasho ay ku qanacsan yihiin shacabka reer Koonfur Galbeed, taas oo ka shaqeyn doonta horumarinta adeegyada dowladnimo ee ay xaqa u leeyihiin.

items.title: DF oo saraakiil u dirtay Luuq iyo xaaladda oo kacsan
items.description: Luuq (Caasimada Online) – Saraakiil ka tirsan Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed oo ay maanta dowladda ka dirtay magaalada Muqdisho ayaa gaaray degmada Luuq ee gobolka Gedo, halkaas oo ay horay uga jireen dhaq-dhaqaaqyo ciidan oo iska soo horjeedo. Saraakiisha maanta tegay Luuq ayaa waxaa hoggaaminaya Abaanduulaha Guutada 43-aad Kornayl Cismaan Xaaji Axmed, waxaana halkaas kusoo dhaweeyay ciidamada dowladda ee horay u joogay halkaasi. Ujeedka wafdigan ayaa ah fulinta qorshaha dowladda, iyaga oo durbo bilaabay kulamo ay la qaadanayaan ciidamada iyo qaybaha kala duwan ee bulshada. Gedo qaybo kamid ah waxaa horay ugu sugnaa ciidamo ka tirsan daraawiishta Jubaland oo diidan dhaq-dhaqaaqa dowladda ee gobolkaasi, sidoo kale waxaa maalmo kahor gobolka tegay ciidamadii taabacsanaa Lafta-gareen ee isaga baxay agagaarka magaalada Baydhabo. Arrintan ayaa keentay in xiisad cusub la dareemo, iyada oo laga cabsi qabo in ciidamadan kala duwan ay horseedaan dagaal ka qarxa halkaas. Loolanka u dhexeeya Dowladda Federaalka iyo Maamulka Jubbaland ayaa sii xoogeysanaya, iyaga oo mar kale u muuqda kuwa fooda is dari doono, marka la eego sida ay wax u socdaan, gaar ahaan dhaq-dhaqaaqyada labada dhinac. Dowladda dhexe ayaa qorsheyneysa in doorashooyin qof iyo cod ah ay ka qabato degmooyin ka tirsan Gedo, halka ay diidan tahay Jubbaland. Muqdisho iyo Kismaayo ayaa muddo dheer waxaa ka dhexeeya khilaaf isku beddelay gacan ka hadal, sidoo kalena sababay inuu go’o xiriirkii labada dhinac. The post DF oo saraakiil u dirtay Luuq iyo xaaladda oo kacsan appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka oo booqday fariisimaha hore ee gobolka Bakool
items.description: RADIO MUQDISHO(BAKOOL):-Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed, sarreeye Guuto Ibraahim Maxamed Maxamuud, ayaa booqday fariisimaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka ay ku leeyihiin magaalada Waajid ee gobolka Bakool. items.title: Villa Somalia Backs Aden Madoobe for South West State Presidency
items.description: A high-level meeting held overnight at the Villa Somalia has resulted in key political decisions supporting Aden Mohamed Nur, widely known as Aden Madoobe, to contest for the presidency of South West State. According to sources familiar with the discussions, the meeting also approved the promotion of Hussein Sheikh Mahmoud to the position of Secretary-General of the Justice and Solidarity Party (JSP), a move seen as reflecting his growing influence in domestic politics, particularly in relation to the forthcoming elections in South West State. These developments come amid intensifying political competition and preparations for regional elections, which have significantly heightened political activity within South West State and the ruling party aligned with the federal leadership. Aden Madoobe is expected to travel to Baidoa, the administrative capital of the Bay region, where political mobilization linked to the electoral process is already underway. Reports indicate that the federal leadership aims to reward his role in advancing recent constitutional amendments, which is viewed as part of a broader strategy to bolster his candidacy. However, the plan is likely to face resistance, as several political actors have expressed dissatisfaction with the current trajectory of the electoral process. Observers note that the situation remains fluid, with further reactions and political shifts expected in the coming days that could influence the direction of the South West State elections. The post Villa Somalia Backs Aden Madoobe for South West State Presidency appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Taliyaha ciidanka xoogga oo tagay furimaha dagaalka ee gobolka Bakool
items.description: Bakool ( Raxanreeb Online) Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed, sarreeye Guuto Ibraahim Maxamed Maxamuud, ayaa booqday fariisimaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka ay ku leeyihiin magaalada Waajid ee gobolka Bakool. Wafdiga Taliyaha ayaa waxaa degmada Waajid ku soo dhaweeyay saraakiil ka tirsan Ciidanka Xoogga, kuwaas oo warbixin ka siiyay xaaladda amni iyo guulaha laga gaaray dagaalka ka dhanka ah kooxaha Al-shabaab iyo Daacish. Ujeedka safarka Taliyaha ayaa ahaa dardargelinta howlgalada ka dhanka ah argagixisada iyo dhiirrigelinta geesiyaasha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka, isagoo ku booriyay inay xoojiyaan dagaalada dalka looga ciribtirayo maleeshiyaadka Al-shabaab. Ugu dambeyntii, Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed ayaa kulan gaar ah la yeeshay odayaasha dhaqanka ee degmada Waajid, isagoo sidoo kale noqday taliyihii ugu horreeyay ee kormeer shaqo ku taga magaaladaas. The post Taliyaha ciidanka xoogga oo tagay furimaha dagaalka ee gobolka Bakool appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Aadan Madoobe Approved as JSP Party Candidate for South West Presidency
items.description: A sensitive meeting held last night at the Somali presidency resulted in a major decision to back the Speaker of the House of the People, Aadan Mohamed Nuur (Aadan Madoobe), as a candidate for the presidency of the South West State. The meeting also endorsed Hussein Sheikh Mohamed for the position of Secretary General of the JSP party, a move seen as reflecting his growing role in domestic politics, particularly regarding the South West elections. These decisions come as political competition intensifies and election preparations ramp up, heightening political activities in South West State and within the party led by Somalia’s President. Meanwhile, Speaker Aadan Madoobe is expected to travel to Baidoa, the capital of Bay region, where political organizing related to the election is already underway. Reports indicate that the Somali presidency seeks to reward Aadan Madoobe for his role in the constitutional amendment process, which is part of the broader strategy to support his candidacy. However, this plan is said to pose a significant challenge to the anticipated election in Baidoa, as numerous politicians remain dissatisfied with the current trajectory of events . The situation remains tense, with further reactions and developments expected in the coming days that could impact the direction of the South West State election.

items.title: SNA Commander Conducts First Official Inspection Visit to Waajid
items.description: The Commander of the Somali National Army, Brigadier General Ibrahim Mohamed Mahmoud, has carried out an official inspection visit to front-line positions held by government forces in Waajid, in the Bakool region. The delegation was received in Waajid by senior officers of the Somali National Army, who briefed the Commander on the prevailing security situation and recent operational gains against insurgent groups. The visit forms part of ongoing efforts to strengthen coordination, accelerate military operations, and sustain pressure on armed militants. During his engagement with troops, Brigadier General Ibrahim Mohamed Mahmoud called for the intensification of operations aimed at dismantling insurgent networks, stressing the need for continued discipline, operational effectiveness, and unity of command. He also commended the forces for their resilience and progress achieved under challenging conditions. In parallel, the Commander held consultations with traditional elders in Waajid, underscoring the importance of community cooperation in consolidating security gains and supporting stabilisation initiatives. Military officials indicated that the visit represents the first time a serving Commander of the Somali National Army has undertaken an operational inspection in Waajid, reflecting the growing strategic significance of the area within the broader security landscape. The post SNA Commander Conducts First Official Inspection Visit to Waajid appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Maxey tahay ujeedka uu guddoomiyaha golaha shacabka u tagay magaalada Baydhabo ?
items.description: Baydhabo ( Raxanreeb Online) Guddoomiyaha golaha shacabka Sheekh Aadan Madobe iyo wefdi uu hoggaaminayo, ayaa maanta gaaray magaalada Baydhabo ee xarunta KMG u ah maamulka Koonfur Galbeed. Guddoomiyaha iyo wefdigiisa, waxaa garoonka diyaaradaha ee Shaati Gaduud ku soo dhoweeyay hoggaamiyaha ku-meel-gaarka ah ee Koonfur Galbeed Jibriil Cabdirashiid Xaaji  iyo masuuliyiin ka tirsan dowladda, siyaasiyiin, iyo qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada. Ujeeddada safarka wafdigan ayaa la xiriirta xoojinta wadatashiyada siyaasadeed iyo ka qeybgalka geeddi-socodka doorashooyinka ka socda Dowladda Koonfur Galbeed Soomaaliya. Hoggaamiye Jibrii, ayaa sheegay in maamulka Koonfur Galbeed ay ka go’an tahay qabsoomidda doorasho hufan, xor ah oo waafaqsan dastuurka, isla markaana ay soo dhoweynayso dhammaan musharraxiinta iyo daneeyayaasha siyaasadeed. Sidoo kale guddoomiye Aadan Madoobe, ayaa uga mahadceliyay mas’uuliyiinta iyo shacabka reer Baydhabo soo dhoweynta diirran, isagoo carrabka ku adkeeyay muhiimadda ay leedahay wada shaqeyn, midnimo, iyo xasillooni siyaasadeed si loo xaqiijiyo horumar waara. The post Maxey tahay ujeedka uu guddoomiyaha golaha shacabka u tagay magaalada Baydhabo ? appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Soomaaliya oo saxiixday heshiis lagu xoojinayo ilaalinta rayidka xiliga howlgalka
items.description: Muqdisho ( Raxanreeb Online) Dowladda Soomaaliya ayaa magaalada Muqdisho, ku qaabishay wafdi ka socday Xarunta Ilaalinta Rayidka ee Xilliyada Colaadaha (CIVIC), oo uu hoggaaminayay Agaasimaha Afrika ee hay’adda, Mudane Vianney Bisimwa. Kulanka intii uu socday, Wasiirka iyo Bisimwa ayaa kala saxiixday Heshiis Is-afgarad oo lagu xoojinayo wada-shaqeynta ku aaddan ilaalinta bed-qabka rayidka, yareynta waxyeellada rayidka xilliyada hawl-gallada ciidan, iyo horumarinta hab-raacyo waafaqsan xeerarka dalka iyo sharciga caalamiga ah ee bani’aadannimada. Heshiiskan ayaa taageeraya hirgelinta Siyaasadda Qaran ee Ilaalinta Bed-qabka Rayidka xilliyada Hawl-gallada Ciidan iyo Colaadaha Hubeysan, taas oo Soomaaliya ka dhigeysa dalkii ugu horreeyay Afrika ee dhaqan-geliya siyaasad noocan ah. Sidoo kale waxa kale oo uu heshiisku xoojinayaa tababarka, wacyigelinta iyo awood-dhiska Ciidamada Qalabka Sida, si loo xaqiijiyo in hawl-gallada loo fuliyo si waafaqsan sharciga, xirfad sare, taxaddar, isla-xisaabtan iyo ilaalinta karaamada rayidka. Wasiir Fiqi ayaa sheegay in Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga ay mudnaan gaar ah siineyso ilaalinta bed-qabka rayidka, isagoo xusay in siyaasaddan ay ka tarjumeyso sida ay Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya uga go’an tahay in dhammaan hawl-gallada amniga lagu hago ilaalinta nolosha, karaamada, xuquuqda iyo bed-qabka shacabka Soomaaliyeed. Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga waxaa ka go’an xoojinta ilaalinta bed-qabka rayidka, kor u qaadista kormeerka iyo isla-xisaabtanka hawl-gallada ciidan, iyo la-shaqeynta hay’adaha qaranka, bulshada rayidka iyo saaxiibbada caalamka, si dib-u-habeynta hay’adaha amniga Soomaaliya loogu saleeyo hannaan waafaqsan sharciga, isla markaana ku dhisan mas’uuliyad iyo kalsooni dadweyne. The post Soomaaliya oo saxiixday heshiis lagu xoojinayo ilaalinta rayidka xiliga howlgalka appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Sawirro: Aadan Madoobe oo ka dagay Baydhaba xilli la go’aamiyey madaxnimadiisa
items.description: Baydhabo (Caasimada Online) – Guddoomiyaha Baarlamaanka Soomaaliya, Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Aadan Madoobe) iyo wafdi uu hoggaaminayo ayaa maanta gaaray magaalada Baydhabo ee xarunta goboka Baay, halkaas oo uu u tegay doorashada Maamulka Koonfur Galbeed. Aadan Madoobe oo ah musharraxa Xisbiga JSP ayaa si weyn loogu soo dhaweeyay magaalada, waxaana ka qayb-galay soo dhaweyntiisa hoggaamiyaha KMG ah ee maamulka, xildhibaanno, wasiirro iyo shacab. Guddoomiyaha oo hadal kooban siiyay warbaahinta ayaa u mahadceliyay madaxda iyo bulshada soo dhaweysay, wuxuuna ku baaqay in deganaan la muujiyo laga wada shaqeeyo amniga inta ay socoto qaban qaabada doorashada. Safarka Aadan Madoobe ee Baydhabo ayaa kusoo beegmaya xilli Villa Somalia ay dadaal xooggan ku bixineyso qaabeynta hoggaanka cusub ee Koonfur Galbeed, kadib markii madaxweynihii hore ee maamulkaas, Cabdicasiis Xasan Maxamed Laftagareen, uu xilka ka degay 30-kii Maarso, maalmo kaddib markii ciidamada dowladda federaalka ay galeen Baydhabo. Ilo-wareedyo siyaasadeed ayaa Caasimada Online u sheegay in Aadan Madoobe loo diyaarinayo inuu noqdo musharraxa ugu culus ee xilka Koonfur Galbeed, iyadoo qaar ka mid ah siyaasiyiinta maamulkaas ay u arkaan musharrax ay dhabarka ku wado Villa Somalia. Xogta ayaa intaas kusii dareysa in Xasan Sheekh uu ku qanciyey agaasimihii hore ee Villa Somalia, ahaana saaxiib aad ugu dhow, Xuseen Sheekh Maxamuud inuu tratnka uga haro Aadan Madoobe, ayada oo si kale loo qanciyey. Arrintan ayaa tartanka ka dhigeysa mid aan u muuqan mid furan, gaar ahaan maadaama Baydhaba ay hadda ku jirto marxalad kala-guur ah oo dowladda federaalka ay saameyn xooggan ku leedahay. Si kastaba, Dhaq-dhaqaaqyada ka socda Baydhaba iyo hakadka ku jira isku-shaandheynta xukuumadda ayaa muujinaya in Villa Somalia ay hadda mudnaanta siineyso xakameynta siyaasadda Koonfur Galbeed, kahor inta aysan qaadin tallaabooyin kale oo gudaha xukuumadda ah. The post Sawirro: Aadan Madoobe oo ka dagay Baydhaba xilli la go’aamiyey madaxnimadiisa appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Somalia Moves to Lock Down Cyber Threats as New Security Framework Takes Shape
items.description: Somalia’s telecoms regulator has launched a major push to shield the nation’s expanding digital space from cyber threats, holding a high‑level consultation to design a comprehensive risk management and compliance blueprint. The National Communications Authority (NCA) brought together key government bodies, private sector players, universities, civil society groups, and technical specialists in Mogadishu on 25 April. The goal: to gather wide‑ranging input for the draft Cybersecurity Risk Management and Compliance Framework, which will set rules for identifying risks, enforcing compliance, and assigning institutional duties. NCA Director General Mustafa Yasin Sheikh urged stakeholders to scrutinize the draft closely. “We encourage all stakeholders to take the time to carefully review the document, analyze it in detail, and provide thoughtful input on each component,” he said. Opening the meeting, the State Minister of Communications and Technology, H.E. MP Ahmed Osman Dirie, noted that as technology spreads into education, business, and daily life, safeguards must keep pace. “Without proper safeguards, these advancements can pose risks. Establishing a robust cybersecurity risk management and compliance framework is essential, and the National Communications Authority is mandated to lead this effort on behalf of the government,” he stated. Participants discussed how to spot emerging cyber threats, design effective regulatory compliance mechanisms, and clarify who does what across sectors. The finalized framework is expected to become a cornerstone of Somalia’s national cybersecurity governance, helping build a more resilient digital ecosystem. The NCA says feedback from the consultation will now be used to complete the framework.

items.title: Soomaliya iyo Cumaan oo kawada hadley xoojinta iskaashiga labada dal
items.description: Cumaan ( Raxanreeb Online) Wasiirka Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda Soomaaliya Cabdisalaan Cabdi Cali ayaa wadahadallo la yeeshay Sayid Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi, Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Saldanadda Cumaan, kulan ka dhacay xarunta Wasaaradda ee magaalada Muscat, intii uu ku guda jiray booqasho rasmi ah oo uu ku tagay dalkaas. Wadahadallada ayey Wasiirradu diiradda ku saareen xoojinta xiriirka laba geesoodka ah iyo horumarinta iskaashiga, si loo adkeeyo iskaashiga soo jireenka ah iyo danaha wadaagga ah ee labada dal ee walaalaha ah. Sidoo kale, labada dhinac ayaa is dhaafsaday aragtiyo ku saabsan xaaladaha gobolka, gaar ahaan Geeska Afrika, iyagoo adkeeyay muhiimadda ay leedahay iskaashi heer gobol iyo heer caalami ah oo lagu horumarinayo amniga, xasilloonida, iyo horumar waara. Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Cumaan, Sayid Badr Al Busaidi, ayaa mar kale xaqiijiyay taageerada adag ee dalkiisa uu u hayo midnimada, madax bannaanida, iyo wadajirka dhuleed ee Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, isagoo sidoo kale waxaa uu caddeeyay mowqifka Cumaan ee ah in aan la aqoonsan karin wax kasta oo ka baxsan nidaamka dowladeed ee Soomaaliya. Dhankiisa, Wasiir Cabdisalaan,ayaa uga mahadceliyay Boqortooyadda Cumaan doorka diblomaasiyadeed ee wax ku oolka ah iyo dadaallada ay ku bixiso dhiirrigelinta wada hadalada, dib u heshiisiinta, iyo xasilloonida gobolka. The post Soomaliya iyo Cumaan oo kawada hadley xoojinta iskaashiga labada dal appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Xogta shaqsigii weerarka fulay iyo Trump oo si kale uga….
items.description: Washington ( Raxanreeb Online) Ninka lagu tuhunsan yahay weerarka toogashada ayaa lagu sheegay inuu yahay Cole Tomas Allen, oo 31 jir ah kana soo jeeda Torrance, California, sida ay sheegtay CBS oo ah la-hawlgalaha wararka Waqooyiga Ameerika. Donald Trump ayaa sheegay in FBI-da iyo Sirdoonka ay fulinayaan amarro baaritaan oo ka socda cinwaan ku yaalla California. Taliyaha ku-meelgaarka ah ee booliiska Washington DC, Jeffery W Carroll, ayaa sheegay in eedeysanuhu uu ahaa marti deggan hoteelka lagu qabanayay munaasabadda, isla markaana uusan jirin sabab loo aaminsan yahay in qof kale uu halis ku jiro. Inkasta oo hay’adaha ammaanku xaqiijiyeen in rasaas la riday, haddana lama oga tirada saxda ah. Booliiska ayaa sheegay in ay rasaas isweydaarsadeen eedeysanaha iyo saraakiisha ammaanka. Carroll ayaa sheegay in eedeysanaha uu “ku hubeysnaa qori, bastoolad, iyo mindiyo badan”. Jeanine Pirro, oo ah xeer ilaaliyaha Mareykanka ee Washington, ayaa sheegtay in eedeysanaha wajahayo laba dacwadood oo la xiriira adeegsiga hub intii lagu guda jiray fal rabshado ah, iyo weerar lagu qaaday saraakiil federaal ah iyadoo la adeegsanayo hub halis ah. Waxay intaas ku dartay in si rasmi ah dacwad loogu soo oogi doono Isniinta. Sababta ka dambeysa weerarka wali ma cadda, balse Trump ayaa sheegay inuu rajeynayo inuu bixiyo war cusub Axadda maanta ah. Madaxweynaha Mareykanka Donald Trump ayaa sheegay in rasaastii ka dhacday cashadii aqalka xilli lagu guda aysan ka joojin doonin qorshihiisa dagaal uu la galo Iran, inkastoo uu aaminsan yahay in dhacdadu u badan tahay inaysan xiriir la lahayn arrintaas. The post Xogta shaqsigii weerarka fulay iyo Trump oo si kale uga…. appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka oo Qabatay Kulan Wadatashi oo ku saabsan Hanaanka Maareynta Khataraha iyo Habraaca U-hoggaansanaanta Amniga Saaybarka
items.description: Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka oo Qabatay Kulan Wadatashi oo ku saabsan Hanaanka Maareynta Khataraha iyo Habraaca U-hoggaansanaanta Amniga Saaybarka Muqdisho, Soomaaliya – 25 Abriil 2026 — Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka (HIQ) ayaa qabatay kulan wadatashi qaran ah si loo horumariyo Qaab-dhismeedka Maareynta Khataraha iyo Habraaca U-hoggaansanaanta Amniga Saaybarka, kaas oo ay kasoo qeyb galeen wakiilo ka socda hay’adaha dowladda, bahda waxbarashada, shirkadaha gaarka loo leeyahay, bulshada rayidka iyo khubaro farsamo. Kulankan ayaa ujeeddadiisu ahayd in la helo talooyin iyo aragtiyo lagu horumarinayo hannaan dhammaystiran oo xoojiya amniga saaybarka dalka, ilaaliya kaabeyaasha dhijitaalka ah ee muhiimka ah, isla markaana xaqiijiya maareynta khataraha iyo u-hoggaansanaan wax ku ool ah oo ka dhex jirta dhammaan qaybaha. Isagoo ka hadlay kulanka, Maareeyaha Guud ee Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka, Mudane Mustafa Yaasin Sheekh, ayaa ka hadlay muhiimadda in si qoto dheer loo eego dukumentiyada: “Waxaan ku dhiirrigelinaynaa dhammaan daneeyayaasha inay waqti geliyaan, si taxaddar leh u eegaan dukumentiyadan, si qoto dheer u falanqeeyaan, una soo gudbiyaan aragtiyo dhammaystiran oo ku saabsan qodob kasta.” Wasiiru Dowlaha Wasaaradda Isgaarsiinta iyo Teknoolojiyadda, Mudane Xildhibaan Axmed Diiriye, oo si rasmi ah u furay kulanka, ayaa muujiyay muhiimadda sii kordheysa ee amniga saaybarka xilli ay teknoolojiyaddu si weyn u saameyneyso nolosha: “Adeegsiga teknoolojiyadda waa mid si joogto ah u kobcaya, wuxuuna saameyn ku leeyahay dhinacyo badan oo nolosha ah sida waxbarashada iyo ganacsiga. Haddii aan laga gaashaaman, horumarradu waxay keeni karaan khataro. Sidaa darteed, dejinta hannaanka maareynta khataraha iyo habraaca u-hoggaansanaanta amniga saaybarka waa mid muhiim ah. Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka ayaa loo xilsaaray inay hoggaamiso dadaalkan iyada oo matalaysa dowladda.” Kulanka ayaa muujiyay muhiimadda ay leedahay in la xoojiyo iskaashiga hay’adaha si loo wajaho khataraha sii kordhaya ee saaybarka loona dhiso nidaam dhijitaal ah oo adkaysi leh. Ka qaybgalayaashu waxay ka doodeen aqoonsiga khataraha, habraacyada u-hoggaansanaanta, iyo doorka hay’adaha kala duwan. Natiijooyinka ka soo baxa kulankan wadatashiga ah ayaa gacan ka geysan doona dhammeystirka hannaanka Maareynta Khataraha iyo Habraaca U-hoggaansanaanta Amniga Saaybarka, kaas oo door muhiim ah ka qaadan doona xoojinta amniga dhijitaalka ah ee dalka.

items.title: Wararkii u dambeeyey isku day la doonayey in lagu dilo Trump iyo toogasho dhacday
items.description: Washington – Madaxweynaha Mareykanka Donald Trump ayaa sheegay inuu badqabo kaddib markii nin hubeysan oo looga shakisan yahay inuu weerar damacsanaa uu rasaas ka furay agagaarka goobta ay ka socotay Casho-sharafeedka Wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad (White House Correspondents’ Dinner). Arrintan ayaa ku qasabtay ciidamada ilaalada madaxda ee Secret Service inay si degdeg ah goobta uga saaraan madaxweynaha, marwada koowaad Melania Trump iyo mas’uuliyiin sare oo ka tirsan dowladda, xilli ay ka qayb-galayeen mid ka mid ah munaasabadaha sanadlaha ah ee ugu caansan magaalada Washington. Trump ayaa habeenkii Sabtida fadhiyay masraxa hoteelka Washington Hilton, isagoo ay weheliyeen Madaxweyne Ku-xigeenka JD Vance, afhayeenka Aqalka Cad Karoline Leavitt iyo mas’uuliyiin ka tirsan ururka wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad, markii si lama filaan ah loo maqlay dhawaqa rasaas xooggan xilli martidu ay ku guda jireen cunteynta hoolka weyn ee munaasabadda. Madaxweynaha ayaa dib ka sheegay in markii hore uu u qaatay in saxan weyn uu dhacay maadaama dhawaqu ula muuqday mid “aad u fog,” balse wuxuu xusay in marwada koowaad ay si degdeg ah u dareentay khatarta. “Waxaan u malaynayaa inay markiiba ogaatay waxa dhacay,” ayuu Trump u sheegay suxufiyiinta isagoo ku sugan Aqalka Cad, wuxuuna xusuustay in Melania Trump ay ku tiri: “Kani waa dhawaq xun.” Trump ayaa sheegay in ciidamada ilaalada ay si degdeg ah uga dejiyeen masraxa. Wuxuu xaqiijiyay in ciidamadu ay qabteen shakhsigii laga shakiyay, isla markaana hal askari oo ka tirsan ilaalada gaarka ah uu ka badbaaday xabbad meel dhow lagaga dhuftay jaakaddiisa xabadda celiysa. “Waxaa masaafo aad u dhow lagaga toogtay qori aad u awood badan, jaakadduna shaqadeedii ayay qabatay,” ayuu yiri Trump. Eedeysanaha ayaa magaciisa lagu sheegay Cole Allen, oo 31 jir ah, kana soo jeeda Torrance, California, sida ay sheegeen laba sarkaal oo ka tirsan hay’adaha amniga oo xog-ogaal u ah baaritaanka. Booliska ayaa sheegay in Allen uu marti ka ahaa hoteelka Washington Hilton, halkaas oo munaasabadda lagu qabtay, isla markaana uu watay qori, bastoolad iyo mindiyo. Mas’uuliyiintu ma aysan shaacin sabab suuragal ah, mana aysan sheegin in uu lahaa bartilmaameed gaar ah. Dadaal baan u galay inaan sii joogo Toogashada ayaa carqaladeysay casho-sharaf kulmisay mas’uuliyiin sare oo dowladeed, wariyeyaal, madaxda shirkadaha ganacsiga iyo dad caan ah oo isugu yimid hal hool. Trump ayaa sheegay inuusan doonayn in munaasabaddu ay soo dhammaato, wuxuuna ku adkaystay inuu sii joogo in kasta oo ay u jirtay qaylo-dhaan amni. “Aad baan ugu dagaallamay si aan u sii joogo,” ayuu yiri. Qoraal uu goor sii horreysay soo dhigay baraha bulshada, ayuu Trump ku ammaanay ciidamada ilaalada gaarka ah iyo kuwa fulinta sharciga, isagoo sheegay inay “qaadeen tallaabo degdeg ah iyo geesinimo leh.” Wuxuu xusay inuu soo jeediyay in munaasabadda la sii wado, balse uu ugu dambayn raacay awaamiirta laamaha amniga. Madaxweynaha ayaa markii dambe caddeeyay in qaban-qaabiyeyaashu ay dhowaan dib u muddeyn doonaan cashada. Trump wuxuu sheegay inuu doonayay in fiidkaasi uu sii socdo maadaama uusan doonayn in “dad xanuunsan” ay “beddelaan nidaamka nolosheena.” Balse saraakiisha amniga ayaa ku amray martida inay isaga baxaan dhismaha. Hoolka weyn ayaa si tartiib-tartiib ah u faaruqay iyadoo dadku ay dul marayeen khamri daatay, masaxado daadsan iyo cuntooyin aan la dhammaysan. Argagax ka dhashay gudaha hoolka Goobjoogayaal ayaa ka warramay argagax soo wajahay dadkii ku sugnaa gudaha hoolka markii dhawaqa rasaastu uu isqabsaday goobta, iyadoo martidu ay gabaad ka dhigteen miisaska hoostooda. Erin Thielman, oo ah haweeney horay uga tirsanaan jirtay milateriga oo dibadda uga baxday hoolka si ay u wacdo wiilkeeda, ayaa sheegtay inay maqashay saddex dhawaq oo xooggan oo ay u qaadatay inay ahaayeen rasaas. Waxay sheegtay inay aragtay nin horteeda ku dhacay kaas oo u muuqday inuu watay qori iyo kaydadka rasaasta. Kaddib waxay u dhaadhacday dabaqa hoose, iyadoo aragtay saraakiil amni oo soo saaraya bistooladahooda. Haweeney kabalyeeri ah oo gabaad raadsanaysay ayaa afka Isbaanishka ku ooysay iyadoo leh: “Ma doonayo inaan halkan ku dhinto. Ma doonayo inaan qolkan ku dhinto.” Martida ayaa hoos u foorarsaday miisaska hoostooda iyadoo ciidamada Secret Service-ka iyo saraakiisha kale ee amniga ay dhex ordayeen goobta. Trump ayaa sheegay in shakhsiga weerarka soo qaaday uusan marnaba u soo dhowaan isaga, uuna ku guuldareystay inuu ka soo gudbo albaabka laga galo hoolka weyn. Madaxweynaha ayaa sheegay inuu sii deeyay muuqaallada kamaradaha amniga ee dhacdadan si loo muujiyo “hufnaan”, loona tuso sida xawliga ah ee ay ciidamada amnigu u dhaqaaqeen. Muuqaalka ayaa muujinayay nin si xawli ah ku dhaafaya qalabka baarista biraha iyo saraakiisha amniga, kuwaas oo qoryahooda ku fiiqay ka hor inta aysan ka bixin shaashadda. Su’aalo ka dhashay sugidda amniga Trump ayaa xaqiijiyay in ninka la qabtay uu watay hub kala duwan kahor inta aysan ciidamada ilaalada joojin. Wuxuu sheegay in saraakiishu ay dib ka ogaan karaan ujeeddada rasmiga ah, balse wuxuu tilmaamay in ninku u muuqday mid kaligiis socday. “Waxay u maleynayaan inuu yahay gacan-ku-dhiigle keligiis ah, aniguna sidaas ayaan aaminsanahay,” ayuu yiri Trump, isagoo ku daray in ninkaasi uu ka yimid gobolka California. Madaxweyne Trump wuxuu sheegay inuusan helin wax xog amni ah oo ku saabsan khatar gaar ah kahor cashada. Dhacdadan ayaa si degdeg ah u dhalisay su’aalo ku aaddan amniga kulankan sanadlaha ah ee qol qura isugu keena madaxda ugu sarraysa siyaasadda, dowladda iyo warbaahinta. Trump ayaa ku baaqay in la adkeeyo ilaalinta, isagoo yiri: “Maanta, waxaan u baahannahay heerar ammaan oo laga yaabo inaan horay loo arag.” Wuxuu sidoo kale xusay in dhacdadani ay tusaale u tahay sababta Aqalka Cad uu ugu baahan yahay amni xooggan iyo hoolkiisa u gaarka ah, isagoo soo hadal-qaaday hool haatan laga dhisayo madaxtooyada. “Kani ma ahayn dhisme si gaar ah ammaan u ah,” ayuu Trump ka yiri hoteelka Washington Hilton. Taariikh madow ee Washington Hilton Hoteelka Washington Hilton oo dhaca waqooyi-galbeed Washington, una jira qiyaastii hal mayl iyo bar Aqalka Cad, ayaa leh taariikh murugo leh marka la eego madaxweynayaasha Mareykanka. Madaxweyne Ronald Reagan ayaa bannaanka hoteelkan lagu toogtay sanadkii 1981-kii, weerar uu fuliyay John Hinckley Jr. Reagan wuu ka badbaaday dhacdadaas, balse weerarkaas waxaa ku dhaawacmay saddex qof oo kale, oo uu ku jiray afhayeenkii Aqalka Cad James Brady. Dhacdadii habeenkii Sabtida ayaa sidoo kale soo cusbooneysiisay xusuusta laba isku-day khaarajin oo lala eegtay Trump intii lagu jiray ololihii doorashada 2024. Bishii Luulyo 2024, Trump oo in ka yar 10 daqiiqo ka hadlayay isu-soo-bax doorasho oo ka dhacay Butler, Pennsylvania, ayaa waxaa rasaas ku furay nin 20 jir ah oo ku sugnaa saqafka kore ee dhisme u jiray qiyaastii 400 oo cagood. Xabbad ayaa Trump kaga dhacday dhegta. Ninka hubeysan ayaa dilay hal qof oo ka qaybgalayay isu-soo-baxa, wuxuuna dhaawacay laba kale. Bishii Sebtembar 2024, Trump ayaa wajahnay khatar kale kaddib markii nin uu qori ka soo dhex taagay deyrka garoonkiisa Golf-ka ee gobolka Florida xilli uu halkaas ku sugnaa. Ciidamada ilaalada ayaa rasaas ku furay ninkaas, saraakiishana goor dambe ayay xireen. Trump ayaa sheegay in falcelintii amniga ee habeenkii Sabtida ka dhacday Washington Hilton ay ka xoog badneyd tii ka dhacday Butler. Wuxuu xusay in isaga aragtidiisa, ciidamada Secret Service-ka ay cashadaas ka sameeyeen “shaqo ka wanaagsan” tii ay ka qabteen isu-soo-baxii Pennsylvania. ‘Dadka ugu saameynta badan’ Markii la weydiiyay sababta isku-dayada khaarajinta ay si isdaba joog ah ugu dhacayaan isaga, Trump wuxuu sheegay inuu darsay dilalka siyaasadeed. “Waan darsay khaarajinta madaxda,” ayuu yiri, isagoo soo jeediyay in hoggaamiyeyaasha sameeya “saameynta ugu weyn,” sida Abraham Lincoln, ay inta badan noqdaan bartilmaameedyo cadowtooyo. “Aad baan u necbahay inaan iraahdo waa arrin aan sharaf u arko, balse wax badan ayaan qabannay,” ayuu yiri Trump. Munaasabadda Casho-sharafeedka Wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad ayaa weli ah mid ka mid ah dhacdooyinka sanadlaha ah ee ugu muhiimsan magaalada Washington, taas oo dhaqan ahaan ay ka soo qaybgalaan madaxweynayaasha, wariyeyaasha, siyaasiyiinta iyo dadka caanka ah. Sabtidii ayaa u ahayd markii ugu horreysay ee Trump uu ka soo muuqdo cashadan tan iyo sanadkii 2015-kii. Kama uusan qaybgelin intii uu ku jiray muddo-xileedkiisii koowaad. Mas’uuliyiinta sare ee maamulka ee ka qaybgalay cashadan waxaa ka mid ahaa Xoghayaha Arrimaha Dibadda Marco Rubio iyo Xoghayaha Difaaca Pete Hegseth. Trump ayaa dhacdadan ku tilmaamay mid “gebi ahaanba naxdin leh” balse wuxuu ku adkaystay in aysan ka hor istaagi doonin inuu fagaaraha kasoo muuqdo mar kale. “Si fudud, waa inaan mar kale sameynaa arrintan,” ayuu kusoo xiray hadalkiisa. items.fullContent: Washington – Madaxweynaha Mareykanka Donald Trump ayaa sheegay inuu badqabo kaddib markii nin hubeysan oo looga shakisan yahay inuu weerar damacsanaa uu rasaas ka furay agagaarka goobta ay ka socotay Casho-sharafeedka Wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad (White House Correspondents’ Dinner). Arrintan ayaa ku qasabtay ciidamada ilaalada madaxda ee Secret Service inay si degdeg ah goobta uga saaraan madaxweynaha, marwada koowaad Melania Trump iyo mas’uuliyiin sare oo ka tirsan dowladda, xilli ay ka qayb-galayeen mid ka mid ah munaasabadaha sanadlaha ah ee ugu caansan magaalada Washington. Trump ayaa habeenkii Sabtida fadhiyay masraxa hoteelka Washington Hilton, isagoo ay weheliyeen Madaxweyne Ku-xigeenka JD Vance, afhayeenka Aqalka Cad Karoline Leavitt iyo mas’uuliyiin ka tirsan ururka wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad, markii si lama filaan ah loo maqlay dhawaqa rasaas xooggan xilli martidu ay ku guda jireen cunteynta hoolka weyn ee munaasabadda. Madaxweynaha ayaa dib ka sheegay in markii hore uu u qaatay in saxan weyn uu dhacay maadaama dhawaqu ula muuqday mid “aad u fog,” balse wuxuu xusay in marwada koowaad ay si degdeg ah u dareentay khatarta. “Waxaan u malaynayaa inay markiiba ogaatay waxa dhacay,” ayuu Trump u sheegay suxufiyiinta isagoo ku sugan Aqalka Cad, wuxuuna xusuustay in Melania Trump ay ku tiri: “Kani waa dhawaq xun.” Trump ayaa sheegay in ciidamada ilaalada ay si degdeg ah uga dejiyeen masraxa. Wuxuu xaqiijiyay in ciidamadu ay qabteen shakhsigii laga shakiyay, isla markaana hal askari oo ka tirsan ilaalada gaarka ah uu ka badbaaday xabbad meel dhow lagaga dhuftay jaakaddiisa xabadda celiysa. “Waxaa masaafo aad u dhow lagaga toogtay qori aad u awood badan, jaakadduna shaqadeedii ayay qabatay,” ayuu yiri Trump. Eedeysanaha ayaa magaciisa lagu sheegay Cole Allen, oo 31 jir ah, kana soo jeeda Torrance, California, sida ay sheegeen laba sarkaal oo ka tirsan hay’adaha amniga oo xog-ogaal u ah baaritaanka. Booliska ayaa sheegay in Allen uu marti ka ahaa hoteelka Washington Hilton, halkaas oo munaasabadda lagu qabtay, isla markaana uu watay qori, bastoolad iyo mindiyo. Mas’uuliyiintu ma aysan shaacin sabab suuragal ah, mana aysan sheegin in uu lahaa bartilmaameed gaar ah. Dadaal baan u galay inaan sii joogo Toogashada ayaa carqaladeysay casho-sharaf kulmisay mas’uuliyiin sare oo dowladeed, wariyeyaal, madaxda shirkadaha ganacsiga iyo dad caan ah oo isugu yimid hal hool. Trump ayaa sheegay inuusan doonayn in munaasabaddu ay soo dhammaato, wuxuuna ku adkaystay inuu sii joogo in kasta oo ay u jirtay qaylo-dhaan amni. “Aad baan ugu dagaallamay si aan u sii joogo,” ayuu yiri. Qoraal uu goor sii horreysay soo dhigay baraha bulshada, ayuu Trump ku ammaanay ciidamada ilaalada gaarka ah iyo kuwa fulinta sharciga, isagoo sheegay inay “qaadeen tallaabo degdeg ah iyo geesinimo leh.” Wuxuu xusay inuu soo jeediyay in munaasabadda la sii wado, balse uu ugu dambayn raacay awaamiirta laamaha amniga. Madaxweynaha ayaa markii dambe caddeeyay in qaban-qaabiyeyaashu ay dhowaan dib u muddeyn doonaan cashada. Trump wuxuu sheegay inuu doonayay in fiidkaasi uu sii socdo maadaama uusan doonayn in “dad xanuunsan” ay “beddelaan nidaamka nolosheena.” Balse saraakiisha amniga ayaa ku amray martida inay isaga baxaan dhismaha. Hoolka weyn ayaa si tartiib-tartiib ah u faaruqay iyadoo dadku ay dul marayeen khamri daatay, masaxado daadsan iyo cuntooyin aan la dhammaysan. Argagax ka dhashay gudaha hoolka Goobjoogayaal ayaa ka warramay argagax soo wajahay dadkii ku sugnaa gudaha hoolka markii dhawaqa rasaastu uu isqabsaday goobta, iyadoo martidu ay gabaad ka dhigteen miisaska hoostooda. Erin Thielman, oo ah haweeney horay uga tirsanaan jirtay milateriga oo dibadda uga baxday hoolka si ay u wacdo wiilkeeda, ayaa sheegtay inay maqashay saddex dhawaq oo xooggan oo ay u qaadatay inay ahaayeen rasaas. Waxay sheegtay inay aragtay nin horteeda ku dhacay kaas oo u muuqday inuu watay qori iyo kaydadka rasaasta. Kaddib waxay u dhaadhacday dabaqa hoose, iyadoo aragtay saraakiil amni oo soo saaraya bistooladahooda. Haweeney kabalyeeri ah oo gabaad raadsanaysay ayaa afka Isbaanishka ku ooysay iyadoo leh: “Ma doonayo inaan halkan ku dhinto. Ma doonayo inaan qolkan ku dhinto.” Martida ayaa hoos u foorarsaday miisaska hoostooda iyadoo ciidamada Secret Service-ka iyo saraakiisha kale ee amniga ay dhex ordayeen goobta. Trump ayaa sheegay in shakhsiga weerarka soo qaaday uusan marnaba u soo dhowaan isaga, uuna ku guuldareystay inuu ka soo gudbo albaabka laga galo hoolka weyn. Madaxweynaha ayaa sheegay inuu sii deeyay muuqaallada kamaradaha amniga ee dhacdadan si loo muujiyo “hufnaan”, loona tuso sida xawliga ah ee ay ciidamada amnigu u dhaqaaqeen. Muuqaalka ayaa muujinayay nin si xawli ah ku dhaafaya qalabka baarista biraha iyo saraakiisha amniga, kuwaas oo qoryahooda ku fiiqay ka hor inta aysan ka bixin shaashadda. Su’aalo ka dhashay sugidda amniga Trump ayaa xaqiijiyay in ninka la qabtay uu watay hub kala duwan kahor inta aysan ciidamada ilaalada joojin. Wuxuu sheegay in saraakiishu ay dib ka ogaan karaan ujeeddada rasmiga ah, balse wuxuu tilmaamay in ninku u muuqday mid kaligiis socday. “Waxay u maleynayaan inuu yahay gacan-ku-dhiigle keligiis ah, aniguna sidaas ayaan aaminsanahay,” ayuu yiri Trump, isagoo ku daray in ninkaasi uu ka yimid gobolka California. Madaxweyne Trump wuxuu sheegay inuusan helin wax xog amni ah oo ku saabsan khatar gaar ah kahor cashada. Dhacdadan ayaa si degdeg ah u dhalisay su’aalo ku aaddan amniga kulankan sanadlaha ah ee qol qura isugu keena madaxda ugu sarraysa siyaasadda, dowladda iyo warbaahinta. Trump ayaa ku baaqay in la adkeeyo ilaalinta, isagoo yiri: “Maanta, waxaan u baahannahay heerar ammaan oo laga yaabo inaan horay loo arag.” Wuxuu sidoo kale xusay in dhacdadani ay tusaale u tahay sababta Aqalka Cad uu ugu baahan yahay amni xooggan iyo hoolkiisa u gaarka ah, isagoo soo hadal-qaaday hool haatan laga dhisayo madaxtooyada. “Kani ma ahayn dhisme si gaar ah ammaan u ah,” ayuu Trump ka yiri hoteelka Washington Hilton. Taariikh madow ee Washington Hilton Hoteelka Washington Hilton oo dhaca waqooyi-galbeed Washington, una jira qiyaastii hal mayl iyo bar Aqalka Cad, ayaa leh taariikh murugo leh marka la eego madaxweynayaasha Mareykanka. Madaxweyne Ronald Reagan ayaa bannaanka hoteelkan lagu toogtay sanadkii 1981-kii, weerar uu fuliyay John Hinckley Jr. Reagan wuu ka badbaaday dhacdadaas, balse weerarkaas waxaa ku dhaawacmay saddex qof oo kale, oo uu ku jiray afhayeenkii Aqalka Cad James Brady. Dhacdadii habeenkii Sabtida ayaa sidoo kale soo cusbooneysiisay xusuusta laba isku-day khaarajin oo lala eegtay Trump intii lagu jiray ololihii doorashada 2024. Bishii Luulyo 2024, Trump oo in ka yar 10 daqiiqo ka hadlayay isu-soo-bax doorasho oo ka dhacay Butler, Pennsylvania, ayaa waxaa rasaas ku furay nin 20 jir ah oo ku sugnaa saqafka kore ee dhisme u jiray qiyaastii 400 oo cagood. Xabbad ayaa Trump kaga dhacday dhegta. Ninka hubeysan ayaa dilay hal qof oo ka qaybgalayay isu-soo-baxa, wuxuuna dhaawacay laba kale. Bishii Sebtembar 2024, Trump ayaa wajahnay khatar kale kaddib markii nin uu qori ka soo dhex taagay deyrka garoonkiisa Golf-ka ee gobolka Florida xilli uu halkaas ku sugnaa. Ciidamada ilaalada ayaa rasaas ku furay ninkaas, saraakiishana goor dambe ayay xireen. Trump ayaa sheegay in falcelintii amniga ee habeenkii Sabtida ka dhacday Washington Hilton ay ka xoog badneyd tii ka dhacday Butler. Wuxuu xusay in isaga aragtidiisa, ciidamada Secret Service-ka ay cashadaas ka sameeyeen “shaqo ka wanaagsan” tii ay ka qabteen isu-soo-baxii Pennsylvania. ‘Dadka ugu saameynta badan’ Markii la weydiiyay sababta isku-dayada khaarajinta ay si isdaba joog ah ugu dhacayaan isaga, Trump wuxuu sheegay inuu darsay dilalka siyaasadeed. “Waan darsay khaarajinta madaxda,” ayuu yiri, isagoo soo jeediyay in hoggaamiyeyaasha sameeya “saameynta ugu weyn,” sida Abraham Lincoln, ay inta badan noqdaan bartilmaameedyo cadowtooyo. “Aad baan u necbahay inaan iraahdo waa arrin aan sharaf u arko, balse wax badan ayaan qabannay,” ayuu yiri Trump. Munaasabadda Casho-sharafeedka Wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad ayaa weli ah mid ka mid ah dhacdooyinka sanadlaha ah ee ugu muhiimsan magaalada Washington, taas oo dhaqan ahaan ay ka soo qaybgalaan madaxweynayaasha, wariyeyaasha, siyaasiyiinta iyo dadka caanka ah. Sabtidii ayaa u ahayd markii ugu horreysay ee Trump uu ka soo muuqdo cashadan tan iyo sanadkii 2015-kii. Kama uusan qaybgelin intii uu ku jiray muddo-xileedkiisii koowaad. Mas’uuliyiinta sare ee maamulka ee ka qaybgalay cashadan waxaa ka mid ahaa Xoghayaha Arrimaha Dibadda Marco Rubio iyo Xoghayaha Difaaca Pete Hegseth. Trump ayaa dhacdadan ku tilmaamay mid “gebi ahaanba naxdin leh” balse wuxuu ku adkaystay in aysan ka hor istaagi doonin inuu fagaaraha kasoo muuqdo mar kale. “Si fudud, waa inaan mar kale sameynaa arrintan,” ayuu kusoo xiray hadalkiisa. items.title: Koonfur Afrika oo Ciidan Milatari u Dirtay Gobollo Dambiyo Ka Sii Kordhayaan.
items.description: Ciidanka milatariga Koonfur Afrika oo loo diray xaafadaha si dambiyada loola dagaallamo Madaxweynaha dalka South Africa, Cyril Ramaphosa, ayaa go’aan adag qaatay ka dib markii uu u adkeysan waayay dambiyada iyo dilalka maalin kasta ka dhaca dalkaas. Madaxweynaha ayaa ansixiyay in ciidanka qaranka (milatariga) ay gudaha dalka soo galaan si ay u caawiyaan booliska oo ku dhibaataysan xakameynta kooxaha hubeysan. Ciidamadan ayaa hadda bilaabay howlgallo laga fulinayo gobollada ugu dhibka badan sida Johannesburg iyo Cape Town. Waxa ay si gaar ah u beegsanayaan kooxaha baadda dadka ka qaata, kuwa macdanta sida sharcidarrada ah u qota, iyo burcadda abaabulan ee dhibka ku haysa shacabka. Koonfur Afrika waxay hadda mareysaa heer aad u khatar ah, iyadoo tobanaan qof maalin kasta dalkaas lagu dilo. Dowladda waxay leedahay ciidanka in la keeno waa nafiskii ugu dambeeyay ee shacabku ku heli karaan ammaan. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxaa jira walaac laga qabo in askarta milatariga aysan aqoon u lahayn sida loola macaamilo dadka shacabka ah, maadaama loogu talagalay dagaal balse aan loogu talagalay shaqo boolis. Khubarada qaar waxay qabaan in milatariga la keeno ay tahay xal ku meel gaar ah, balse loo baahan yahay in sirdoonka la xoojiyo si looga takhaluso madaxda kooxaha dambiyada ee magaalada dhexdeeda ku dhuumaaleysanaya.

items.title: Maxaa gaar ka dhigay Caleema-saarkii maanta ee Ugaaska Guud ee beesha Murusade?
items.description: Caleema-saarkii Ugaaska Guud ee Beesha Murusade: Maxaa ka duwanaa xafladihii hore, maxayse ka dhigan tahay saameynta uu yeeshay? MUQDISHO — Magaalada Muqdisho ayaa maanta martigelisay munaasabad taariikhi ah oo si weyn looga dareemay guud ahaan dalka, taas oo lagu caleema saaray Ugaaska Guud ee beesha Murusade, Ugaas Cabdirisaaq Ugaas Cabdullaahi Ugaas Xaashi Faracadde . Xafladdan oo diyaargarowgeedu socday muddo bilooyin ah, ayaa noqotay mid indhaha dadweynaha iyo falanqeeyayaashaba soo jiidatay qaabka casriga ah ee loo agaasimay. Kulankii “Muxaafid iyo Mucaarad”: Midnimo ka baxsan Siyaasadda Waxa ugu weyn ee munaasabaddan ka dhigay mid gaar ah ayaa ahayd heerka ka-qeybgalka. Madasha waxaa ku wada sugnaa madaxda ugu sarreysa dowladda Federaalka, siyaasiyiinta mucaaradka ugu miisaanka culus, safiirro, iyo wufuud ka timid deegaannada Soomaalidu degto ee ka baxsan xudduudda, sida magaalada Jigjiga. Joogitaanka dhinacyada isku haya siyaasadda dalka ee hal masrax ayaa loo arkaa guul weyn oo u soo hoyatay hoggaanka dhaqanka, taas oo muujinaysa in weli dhaqanku yahay halka keliya ee ay ku kulmi karaan qalbiyada dadka isku diiddan masiirka dalka. Saameyn miyuu u geystay aragtida casriga ah ee Dhaqanka? Caleema-saarka Ugaas Cabdirisaaq ma uusan ahayn mid dhaqameed oo qura, balse wuxuu xambaarsanaa fariimo dhowr ah oo saameyn leh: Ugaaska oo ah aqoonyahán dhallinyaro ah, waxay rajo gelinaysaa jiilka cusub ee raba inay arkaan dhaqanka oo la jaanqaadaya casriga, kana fog qabyaaladda caadifadda ku dhisan.Qaabka loo dhisay teendhada xafladda iyo nidaamka guud ee goobta ayaa muujiyay in Soomaaliya ay awood u leedahay qabashada munaasabado heer caalami ah oo nidaamsan.Khudbadihii laga jeediyay madasha ayaa dhamaantood ku qotoma baahida loo qabo is-cafis iyo in loo midoobo danaha guud ee qaranka. Ugaaska iyo Caqabadaha Hor yaalla Ugaas Cabdirisaaq oo hadalka qaatay ayaa qiray in xilkan uu yahay mid culus, balse uu diyaar u yahay inuu noqdo buundada isku xirta qaybaha bulshada. Falanqeeyayaasha ayaa aaminsan in doorka Ugaaska cusub uu muhiim u noqon doono xasilloonida siyaasadeed ee Muqdisho iyo deegaannada kale, maadaama uu yahay hoggaamiye ay u hoggaansan yihiin qaybaha kala duwan ee bulshada uu matalo.

items.title: Dowladda oo Garab Istaagtay Xulka Gabdhaha Qaranka ka hor Tartanka Tanzania!
items.description: Xulka Gabdhaha Qaranka oo dhiirrigelin ballan-qaad ah ka helay dowladda ka hor tartanka Tanzania MUQDISHO — Wasaaradda Dhallinyarada iyo Ciyaaraha Soomaaliya ayaa maanta dhiirrigelin iyo dardaaran ugu sameysay magaalada Muqdisho ciyaartooyda Xulka Qaranka Kubadda Cagta ee Gabdhaha, kuwaas oo isku diyaarinaya tartan caalami ah oo bisha June ka dhici doona dalka Tanzania. Munaasabaddan oo ka dhacday xarunta Saamiya Athletes Center ee ku dhex taal Somali Olympic Committee, ayaa lagu soo dhoweeyay gabdhaha xulka qaranka oo halkaas ku qaadan doona tababar adag oo socon doona muddo 45 maalmood ah ka hor inta aysan u safrin dalka Tanzania. Taageerada Madaxda iyo Bahda Ciyaaraha Wasiirka Wasaaradda, Maxamed Cabdulqaadir Cali , iyo Wasiir Ku-xigeenka, Dahabo Suusow Maxamuud , oo ka qeyb galay munaasabadda, ayaa xulka gabdhaha u xaqiijiyay in dowladda Federaalka ay garab taagan tahay. Wasiir Dahabo Suusow oo la hadashay gabdhaha ayaa carrabka ku adkeysay in ciyaaraha ay yihiin waddada ugu habboon ee lagu muujin karo kartida iyo horumarka haweenka Soomaaliyeed. Waxaa sidoo kale goobta ku sugnaa mas’uuliyiin ka tirsan xiriirka kubadda cagta ee SFF, kuwaas oo sheegay in gabdhahan ay yihiin safiirro matalaya calanka iyo qarannimada Soomaaliyeed. Dhiirrigelinta xulka gabdhaha ma ahan mid ciyaaro oo qura, balse waxay xambaarsan tahay fariimo siyaasadeed iyo kuwo bulsho oo saameyn leh: Tallaabadan ayaa muujinaysa dadaalka dowladda ee ku aaddan in haweenka laga siiyo boos muuqda dhinac kasta, gaar ahaan ciyaaraha oo muddo dheer caqabado ka jireen. Falanqeeyayaasha ayaa aaminsan in guulaha gabdhaha ay horseedi karaan in bulshadu ay u aragto ciyaaraha haweenka wax muhiim u ah dhisidda qaranka, taas oo dhiirrigelin u ah jiilka cusub. In gabdhaha Soomaaliyeed ay ku tartamaan fagaarayaasha caalamiga ah waxay kor u qaadaysaa sumcadda dalka, waxayna calaamad u tahay in Soomaaliya ay ka soo kabanayso colaadihii, una soo jeesatay horumarka dadka iyo dalka. Ciyaartooyda xulka qaranka gabdhaha ayaa hadda wajahaya tababar adag, iyadoo dowladda iyo shacabkuba ay ka sugayaan inay guulo muuqda ka soo hooyaan tartanka Tanzania. Rajada laga qabo in gabdhaha Soomaaliyeed ay sumcad u soo hooyaan dalka ayaa ah mid aad u sarreysa, waxaana la filayaa in safarkoodu uu noqdo mid miro-dhal ah.
items.fullContent: Xulka Gabdhaha Qaranka oo dhiirrigelin ballan-qaad ah ka helay dowladda ka hor tartanka Tanzania MUQDISHO — Wasaaradda Dhallinyarada iyo Ciyaaraha Soomaaliya ayaa maanta dhiirrigelin iyo dardaaran ugu sameysay magaalada Muqdisho ciyaartooyda Xulka Qaranka Kubadda Cagta ee Gabdhaha, kuwaas oo isku diyaarinaya tartan caalami ah oo bisha June ka dhici doona dalka Tanzania. Munaasabaddan oo ka dhacday xarunta Saamiya Athletes Center ee ku dhex taal Somali Olympic Committee, ayaa lagu soo dhoweeyay gabdhaha xulka qaranka oo halkaas ku qaadan doona tababar adag oo socon doona muddo 45 maalmood ah ka hor inta aysan u safrin dalka Tanzania. Taageerada Madaxda iyo Bahda Ciyaaraha Wasiirka Wasaaradda, Maxamed Cabdulqaadir Cali , iyo Wasiir Ku-xigeenka, Dahabo Suusow Maxamuud , oo ka qeyb galay munaasabadda, ayaa xulka gabdhaha u xaqiijiyay in dowladda Federaalka ay garab taagan tahay. Wasiir Dahabo Suusow oo la hadashay gabdhaha ayaa carrabka ku adkeysay in ciyaaraha ay yihiin waddada ugu habboon ee lagu muujin karo kartida iyo horumarka haweenka Soomaaliyeed. items.title: Somalia’s president clears field for ally in Southwest leadership race
items.description: MOGADISHU (Somaliguardian) – Somalia’s President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud on Saturday persuaded one of the leading contenders in the race for Southwest state president to withdraw, bolstering the prospects of Adan Mohamed Nur, who is now widely expected to become the region’s next leader as authorities in Mogadishu shape the conditions for an uncontested outcome in an upcoming vote. The president appeared publicly shaking hands with both the parliamentary speaker, widely known as Adan Madobe, and his longtime ally Hussein Sheikh Mohamud. Hussein Sheikh Mohamud, previously considered a strong candidate, subsequently withdrew from the race. All three men belong to the ruling Justice and Solidarity Party. Mohamud is backing Madobe, who helped steer through parliament the ratification of controversial constitutional amendments, a move widely seen by observers as earning him the president’s support. The federal government has promised to hold a free and fair one-person, one-vote election in the region. That pledge, however, has been cast into doubt by the president’s direct involvement, including efforts to limit competition within his own party and clear the field for Madobe. Other influential ruling party figures have also been persuaded not to run. Ports Minister Abdulkadir Mohamed Nur and Religious Affairs Minister Mukhtar Robow were among those who held back their ambitions after being encouraged to step aside. Analysts say a free and fair vote in Baidoa is unlikely. The federal government seized control of the region by military force last month and continues to exercise broad authority, with no independent electoral commission in place to oversee the process. Few powerful politicians are willing to participate, reinforcing expectations of a noncompetitive outcome. The Somali government has also been reported for weeks to be planning a major cabinet reshuffle. That process now appears delayed, as attention shifts to Southwest state, where authorities are focused on installing a loyal regional leader before proceeding with broader changes. Contact us: info@somaliguardian.com

items.title: Aamino Eelaay oo shaacisay xog ku aadan doorashada ka dhaceysa Koonfur Galbeed
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Xildhibaan Aamino Eelaay oo ka tirsan mudanayaasha Golaha Shacabka Soomaaliya oo ku sugan magaalada Baydhabo ayaa ka hadashay doorashada Maamul-goboleedka Koonfur Galbeed, xilli haatan ay socoto qaban qaabadii ugu dambeysay ee doorashada. Aamin oo garoonka Shaati Gaduud u tegtay soo dhaweynta wafdiga uu hoggaaminayo Sheekh Aadan Madoobe oo kamid ah musharrixiinta ugu cad cad ee Koonfur Galbeed ayaa sheegtay in qaban qaabada doorashada ay ku socoto jawi deggan. Xildhibaannada ayaa sidoo kale sheegtay in Aadan Madoobe uu yahay rug-cadaa siyaasadeed oo isku wadi karo bulshada Koonfur Galbeed, iyada oo sidoo kale shacabka ugu baaqday in laga shaqeeyo nabadda Baydhabo. “Maanta waa maalin wayn guddoomiyihii baarlamaanka Soomaaliya ayaan soo dhaweyneynaa waana musharax madaxweyne waxaan is leeyahay waa ninkii isku keen hayn lahaa oo ilaalada Power Sharing” ayay tiri Aamina Eelaay. Sidoo kale waxay kusii dartay “Dhammaan reer Baydhaba waxaan leeyahay garbaha aan is qabsano nabadda aan ka wada shaqeyno nabadaa naas la nuuga leh”. Safarka Aadan Madoobe ku tegay Baydhabo ayaa kusoo beegmaya xilli Villa Somalia ay dadaal xooggan ku bixineyso qaabeynta hoggaanka cusub ee Koonfur Galbeed, kadib markii madaxweynihii hore ee maamulkaas, Cabdicasiis Xasan Maxamed Laftagareen, uu xilka ka degay 30-kii Maarso, maalmo kaddib markii ciidamada dowladda federaalka ay galeen Baydhabo. Ilo-wareedyo siyaasadeed ayaa Caasimada Online u sheegay in Aadan Madoobe loo diyaarinayo inuu noqdo musharraxa ugu culus ee xilka Koonfur Galbeed, iyadoo qaar ka mid ah siyaasiyiinta maamulkaas ay u arkaan musharrax ay dhabarka ku wado Villa Somalia. Arrintan ayaa tartanka ka dhigeysa mid aan u muuqan mid furan, gaar ahaan maadaama Baydhaba ay hadda ku jirto marxalad kala-guur ah oo dowladda federaalka ay saameyn xooggan ku leedahay. Si kastaba, Dhaq-dhaqaaqyada Baydhaba iyo hakadka ku jira isku-shaandheynta xukuumadda ayaa muujinaya in Villa Somalia ay hadda mudnaanta siineyso xakameynta siyaasadda Koonfur Galbeed, kahor inta aysan qaadin tallaabooyin kale oo gudaha xukuumadda ah. The post Aamino Eelaay oo shaacisay xog ku aadan doorashada ka dhaceysa Koonfur Galbeed appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Xogta tahriibayaal Soomaali ah oo ku naf waayay badda  Mediterranean-ka
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasimada Online) – Dowladda Soomaaliya ayaa faah-faahin dheeraad ah ka bixisay dhacdo aragagax leh oo la xiriirta dhalinyaro Soomaali ah oo ku geeryooday xeebaha u dhexeeya dalalka Aljeeriya iyo Spain. Guddoomiyaha Hay’adda Maareynta Musiibooyinka Qaranka, Maxamuud Macallin oo shir jaraa’id qabtay ayaa sheegay in ugu yaraan 17 dhalinyaro ah oo ku dhinteen mashaqadaas, isla markaana ay wadaan dadaadallo dheeri ah. “Badda u dhexeysa Spain iyo Algeria waxaa ku geeriyooday illaa 17 dhalinyaro ah oo Soomaaliyeed oo runtii xeebtaas ku tahriibayay dadkaas sida aan xogta ku helnay 12 kamid ah waa wiilal, halka 5 kalena ay yihiin gabdho, waxayna da’dooda u dhexeysaa 18 illaa 30 sano” ayuu yiri Maxamuud Macallin. Sidoo kale, wuxuu fariin u diray waalidiinta dhalinyaradaas, isaga oo ugu baaqay in ay la soo xariiraan hay’adda, si ay helaan warbixin dhamaystiran. “Waxaan haynaa sawirrada marxuumiinta Ilaahey ha u naxariisto waxaan dooneynaa oo halkan aan u joognaa in aan helino macluumaad intaas ka dheeri ah waxaan ka codsaneynaa in waalidiinta ay nala soo xiriiraan, si aan u ogaano inta dhimatay warbixintana la’isugu hagaajiyo” ayuu sii raaciyay. Dhanka kale, Guddoomiyaha SoDMA ayaa guud ahaan dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed uga digay halista tahriibka, isaga oo sheegay in sanadahan ay sii kordheen, maadaama dad badan ay ku geeriyoodeen biyaha. “Dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed waxaan u sheegeynaa xaaladahaan waa nagu bateen in ay ka taxadaraan tahriibka waa adag yahay waana dhib badan yahay waa halis”. ayuu mar kale yiri guddoomiyaha Hay’adda SoDMA. Badda Mediterranean-ka ayaa sii ahaaneysa marin halis badan oo ay tahriibayaal badan isticmaalaan, iyaga oo doonaya in ay gaaraan qaaradda Yurub. Qof walba oo safar halis ah gelaya waxa uu xambaarsan yahay rajo nololeed, balse mararka qaar rajooyinkaas waxa ay ku dhammaadaan geeri iyo go’doon. Si kastaba, ha’ahaatee, Musiibadan waxay mar kale iftiiminaysaa baahida loo qabo xal waara oo ku saabsan tahriibka dhalinyarada, si looga hortago in noloshooda khatarta gelinayaan iyaga oo raadinaya nolol ka wanaagsan tan dalka. Dowladda, bulshada caalamka, iyo hay’adaha samafalka ayaa loo baahan yahay inay si wadajir ah u wajahaan arrinkan. The post Xogta tahriibayaal Soomaali ah oo ku naf waayay badda Mediterranean-ka appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Muwaadin Soomaaliyeed oo lagu eedeeyay burcad-badeednimo iyo dukumiintiyo been abuur ah oo lagu xiray Maraykanka
items.description: Laamaha ammaanka ee dalka Mareykanka ayaa xabsiga dhigay Siciid Jaamac Axmed, oo ah muwaadin Soomaaliyeed, kaddib markii lagu eedeeyay inuu si sharci darro ah ku joogay dalkaasi isla markaana isticmaalayay baasaboor been abuur ah. Sida lagu sheegay qoraal ka soo baxay Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha Mareykanka ayaa baaritaanno lagu sameeyay faraha laga qaaday eedeysanaha ayaa muujiyay xog hore oo diiwaangashaneyd tan iyo 2012, taasoo la xiriirta tuhuno ku saabsan ku lug lahaansho falal burcad-badeednimo oo ka dhacay xeebaha Somalia. Mas’uuliyiinta Maraykanka ayaa sheegay in kiiska uu weli socdo, iyadoo eedeymaha la xiriira joogitaan sharci darro ah, dukumiintiyo been abuur ah iyo tuhunnada burcad-badeednimo ay qeyb ka yihiin baaritaanka socda.

items.title: Nin hubeysan oo dhexgalay munaasabaddii Trump iyo White House.
items.description: Rasaas laga maqlay Aqalka Cad iyo Madaxweyne Trump oo si degdeg ah loo daadgureeyay WASHINGTON, D.C — Xaalad argagax iyo jahawareer leh ayaa caawa ka dhex qaraxday dhismaha Aqalka Cad (White House) ka dib markii gudaha laga ngheeyay rasaas dhowr jeer ah. Dhacdan oo timid xilli ay socotay xafladda sannadlaha ah ee White House Correspondents’ Dinner , ayaa sababtay in si degdeg ah goobta looga saaro Madaxweynaha Mareykanka, Donald Trump , iyo mas’uuliyiin kale oo sarsare. Faahfaahinta Weerarka iyo Aqoonsiga Eedeysanaha Booliiska magaalada Washington ayaa xaqiijiyay in weerarka uu fuliyay nin hubeysan oo dhexgalay dadkii ka qaybgalayay munaasabadda. Taliyaha booliiska, Jeffrey Carroll , ayaa sheegay in ninkaas la qabtay isagoo wata hub kala duwan oo isugu jira: Qori nooca loox-tuurka ah (Shotgun). Bastoolad iyo mindiyo dhowr ah. Eedeysanaha ayaa lagu aqoonsaday Cole Allen , oo 31 jir ah, kuna dhashay magaalada Torrance. Sida ay sheegayaan wararka hordhaca ah, ninkan ayaa marti ku ahaa hoteelka Hilton , halkaas oo uu kasoo dhex baxay qol ku-meel-gaar ah oo u dhow albaabka laga galo xafladda, kaas oo la sheegay in ammaankiisu uu dabacsanaa. Xaaladda Ammaanka iyo Khasaaraha In kasta oo rasaasta ay keentay in boqolaal dadweyne ah ay miisaska hoostooda galaan si ay u dhuuntaan, haddana ilaha rasmiga ah waxay xaqiijiyeen in: Madaxweyne Trump iyo mas’uuliyiinta kale ay badqabaan oo la geeyay goob ammaan ah. Ilaa hadda aan la soo sheegin wax khasaare nafeed ama dhaawac ah oo ka dhashay rasaastaas. Dhacdadan ayaa dhalisay su’aalo culus oo ku saabsan nidaamka ammaanka ee goobaha sida aadka ah loo ilaaliyo: Dayac Amni: Waxaa la baarayaa sida uu ninkan ugu suurtagashay inuu boorso ay hub ka buuxaan la galo hotelka ay ku sugnaayeen madaxda dalka iyo suxufiyiinta caalamka. Baaritaan Cusub: Hay’adaha ammaanka (Secret Service) ayaa bilaabay dib-u-eegis lagu samaynayo habraacyada munaasabadaha waaweyn. Falanqeeyayaasha ayaa aaminsan in dhacdadan ay keeni karto dood hor leh oo ku saabsan amniga gudaha iyo sida looga hortagi karo dadka hubeysan ee gala goobaha muhiimka ah. Xaaladda ayaa hadda ah mid degan, balse baaritaannada ayaa weli socda si loo ogaado ujeedka dhabta ah ee Cole Allen iyo haddii ay jiraan dad kale oo ku weheliyay falkan.
items.fullContent: Rasaas laga maqlay Aqalka Cad iyo Madaxweyne Trump oo si degdeg ah loo daadgureeyay WASHINGTON, D.C — Xaalad argagax iyo jahawareer leh ayaa caawa ka dhex qaraxday dhismaha Aqalka Cad (White House) ka dib markii gudaha laga ngheeyay rasaas dhowr jeer ah. Dhacdan oo timid xilli ay socotay xafladda sannadlaha ah ee White House Correspondents’ Dinner , ayaa sababtay in si degdeg ah goobta looga saaro Madaxweynaha Mareykanka, Donald Trump , iyo mas’uuliyiin kale oo sarsare. Faahfaahinta Weerarka iyo Aqoonsiga Eedeysanaha Booliiska magaalada Washington ayaa xaqiijiyay in weerarka uu fuliyay nin hubeysan oo dhexgalay dadkii ka qaybgalayay munaasabadda. Taliyaha booliiska, Jeffrey Carroll , ayaa sheegay in ninkaas la qabtay isagoo wata hub kala duwan oo isugu jira: Qori nooca loox-tuurka ah (Shotgun). Bastoolad iyo mindiyo dhowr ah. Eedeysanaha ayaa lagu aqoonsaday Cole Allen , oo 31 jir ah, kuna dhashay magaalada Torrance. Sida ay sheegayaan wararka hordhaca ah, ninkan ayaa marti ku ahaa hoteelka Hilton , halkaas oo uu kasoo dhex baxay qol ku-meel-gaar ah oo u dhow albaabka laga galo xafladda, kaas oo la sheegay in ammaankiisu uu dabacsanaa. Xaaladda Ammaanka iyo Khasaaraha In kasta oo rasaasta ay keentay in boqolaal dadweyne ah ay miisaska hoostooda galaan si ay u dhuuntaan, haddana ilaha rasmiga ah waxay xaqiijiyeen in: Madaxweyne Trump iyo mas’uuliyiinta kale ay badqabaan oo la geeyay goob ammaan ah. Ilaa hadda aan la soo sheegin wax khasaare nafeed ama dhaawac ah oo ka dhashay rasaastaas. Dhacdadan ayaa dhalisay su’aalo culus oo ku saabsan nidaamka ammaanka ee goobaha sida aadka ah loo ilaaliyo: Dayac Amni: Waxaa la baarayaa sida uu ninkan ugu suurtagashay inuu boorso ay hub ka buuxaan la galo hotelka ay ku sugnaayeen madaxda dalka iyo suxufiyiinta caalamka. Baaritaan Cusub: Hay’adaha ammaanka (Secret Service) ayaa bilaabay dib-u-eegis lagu samaynayo habraacyada munaasabadaha waaweyn. Falanqeeyayaasha ayaa aaminsan in dhacdadan ay keeni karto dood hor leh oo ku saabsan amniga gudaha iyo sida looga hortagi karo dadka hubeysan ee gala goobaha muhiimka ah. Xaaladda ayaa hadda ah mid degan, balse baaritaannada ayaa weli socda si loo ogaado ujeedka dhabta ah ee Cole Allen iyo haddii ay jiraan dad kale oo ku weheliyay falkan.

items.title: Mareykanka oo doonaya in Spain laga saaro NATO
items.description: Madrid (Caasimada Online) – Dowladda Mareykanka ayaa ku hanjabtay inay “ciqaabi doonto” xulafadeeda gaashaanbuurta NATO, sababo la xiriira taageero la’aantooda ku aaddan dagaalka Iiraan, iyadoo ka fakaraysa tallaabooyin adag oo ay ka mid tahay in dalka Spain laga saaro isbaheysiga. Sida lagu arkay farriin (email) gudaha ah oo ka soo baxday xarunta Wasaaradda Difaaca Mareykanka ee Pentagon-ka, oo ay heshay wakaaladda wararka ee Reuters, xukuumadda Washington ayaa diyaarisay qorsheyaal dhowr ah oo ay cawaaqib-xumo ugu geysaneyso xulafadeeda. Tallaabooyinka laga fiirsanayo waxaa ka mid ah in Mareykanku uu aqoonsado sheegashada dalka Argentina ee ku aaddan jasiiradaha Falkland (Falkland Islands)—oo ay xukuumadda Buenos Aires u taqaano Las Malvinas—si loo ciqaabo Ingiriiska, iyo sidoo kale in waddamada “madax-adeyga” muujiyay laga hor istaago inay qabtaan jagooyinka muhiimka ah ama sharafta leh ee gudaha gaashaanbuurta NATO. Madaxweyne Donald Trump, oo muddo dheer dhaliilsanaa wax uu u arko dheellitir-la’aan awoodeed oo u dhaxeysa Mareykanka iyo xubnaha kale ee NATO, ayaan qarin carada uu ka qabo sida Yurub ay uga soo horjeeddo dagaalka ay Mareykanka iyo Israa’iil kula jiraan Iiraan. Horraantii bishii Abriil, wuxuu ku celiyay hanjabaaddiisa ah inuu Mareykanka ka saari doono isbaheysiga, inkastoo farriinta Pentagon-ka aysan soo jeedinayn in tallaabadaas la qaadayo xilligan. Dalka Spain ayaa ahaa dalka ugu cadcad ee sida weyn u dhaliilay dagaalka lagu qaaday Iiraan, isagoo bilowgiiba ku dhawaaqay inuu yahay mid sharci-darro ah, isla markaana u diiday Mareykanka inuu isticmaalo saldhigyadiisa milateri iyo hawadiisa si uu uga fuliyo hawlgallada dagaalkaas. Farriinta Pentagon-ka ayaa labadaas arrimood ku sifeysay inay yihiin “aasaaska ugu hooseeya ee laga rabo xubnaha NATO” marka la eego in dalalku ay gutaan waajibaadkooda iyo doorkooda isbaheysiga. Maalintii Jimcaha, Spain ayaa si kulul uga jawaabtay warbixinnadan, iyadoo Ra’iisul Wasaare Pedro Sanchez uu caddeeyay in dalkiisu uu si buuxda u gudanayo dhammaan waajibaadkii saarnaa. “Spain waa xubin lagu kalsoonaan karo oo ka tirsan NATO, taas oo fulinaysa dhammaan waajibaadkeeda,” ayuu Sanchez u sheegay suxufiyiinta isagoo ku sugan dalka Qubrus oo uu kaga qaybgalayay shir madaxeedka Midowga Yurub. “Sidaas darteed, gabi ahaanba kama walaacsani arrintan,” ayuu sii raaciyay. Sidoo kale, Isbahaysiga NATO ayaa sheegay in aysan jirin qodob u oggolaanaya in waddamada xubnaha ka ah laga joojiyo ama laga eryo isbaheysiga milatari. Sarkaal ka tirsan NATO ayaa u sheegay BBC-da in heshiiskii lagu aasaasay isbaheysiga “uusan dhigayn wax qodob ah oo loogu talagalay joojinta xubinnimada NATO, ama ka saarid ah”. Dhanka kale, diidmada Ingiriiska ee dagaalka Iiraan ayaa ahayd mid ka yara dabacsan tii Spain, maadaama ay u oggolaadeen diyaaradaha Mareykanka inay adeegsadaan saldhigyada Ingiriiska, balse haddana Ra’iisul Wasaare Keir Starmer ayaa soo jiitay carada Trump. Madaxweynaha midigta-fog ee Argentine, Javier Milei, oo xulufo dhow la ah Trump, ayaa dhowr jeer sheegay inuu taageersan yahay in jasiiradaha Falkland ay hoos yimaadaan maamulka dalkiisa. Jasiiradahan ayaa waxaa xoog ku galay Argentine sanadkii 1982-kii, arrintaas oo dhalisay dagaal dhexmaray labada dal oo sababay dhimashada ku dhawaad kun qof. Dhulkaan ayaa illaa iyo hadda ku hoos jira maamulka Boqortooyada Ingiriiska. Wargeyska Middle East Eye ayaa la xiriiray Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda Ingiriiska si ay uga hadlaan farriinta Pentagon-ka iyo jawaabta ay bixin karaan haddii tallaabadan la meelmariyo. Wasaaradda ayaa tixraacday qoraal uu barta X soo dhigay Wasiiru-dowlaha dhulalka dibadda ee Ingiriiska, Stephen Doughty, kaas oo sheegay in “aaya-ka-tashiga, madax-bannaanida iyo difaaca jasiiradaha Falkland ay tahay mid aan gorgortan geli karin – mar walbana ay noqon doonto mudnaanta koowaad.” Si kastaba ha ahaatee, kama aysan hadlin sida ay dowladda Ingiriisku uga falcelin doonto tallaabada suurtagalka ah ee Mareykanka. Markii wakaaladda wararka ee Reuters ay wax ka weydiisay farriintaas, Afhayeenka Pentagon-ka Kingsley Wilson ayaa yiri: “Sida uu Madaxweyne Trump sheegay, inkastoo Mareykanku uu wax kasta u sameeyay xulafadeena NATO, haddana garab nama aysan siin. Waaxda Dagaalku waxay xaqiijin doontaa in Madaxweynuhu uu helo xulashooyin la isku halleyn karo, si loo hubiyo in xulafadeenu aysan mar dambe ahaanin magac-u-yaal oo keliya, balse ay qaataan doorkooda dhabta ah. Ma hayno faahfaahin intaas dhaafsiisan oo ku saabsan wada-tashiyada gudaha ee arrintaas la xiriira.” The post Mareykanka oo doonaya in Spain laga saaro NATO appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Clan conflict causes hundreds of families to flee burnt farms in Bay region
items.description: (ERGO) – Thousands of farming families displaced by inter-clan conflict in parts of southern Somalia’s Bay region are facing worsening living conditions in camps around Baidoa and Bardale, after losing their farms, food stores, and homes. The families fled from Kurji, Kuusow, Duugsoy, Darab-Ajuuso, Moora-Qasaale and Buulo-Bilaan villages near Bardale in March, when fighting spread through their areas. Many say their crops, houses, and food reserves were deliberately burned, destroying their only means of survival. Qasido Nur Hassan is among those now struggling in Kuusow camp on the outskirts of Baidoa, where she cannot provide adequate food, water, and shelter for her nine children. She told Radio Ergo that since arriving, they have received little assistance. She depends on receiving small portions of cooked food from any other families that manage to light a cooking fire. “We are facing the worst situation. We have no proper tents, no blankets. Everything we owned was burned. Before the conflict, life was better. We survived on what we harvested and stored from our farm,” Qasido said. They are staying out in the open at a time when seasonal rains have started in the region. Qasido said three of her children have developed fever, but she had no access to medical care nor money to seek treatment. She believes the illnesses are linked to exposure and mosquitoes, as they have no protection at night. Health services nearby require payment that she cannot afford. Before the conflict, Qasido relied on a three-hectare farm in Kurji, along with three food storage facilities – all of them burnt down. The fighting erupted just as she had planted crops after several years of poor rainfall. The return of rain had given her hope for a good harvest, but then she was forced to flee. “My biggest worry is the farm. The crops are still there in the open with no fencing, and the conflict is ongoing. I have no way to go back or protect it. My children depended on that farm. I keep asking myself how we will survive now,” she said. She had planted a mix of vegetables and staple crops and expected to earn nearly $3,000 at harvest. Instead, she is left with debts of $600 incurred during planting, plus $1,200 she owes local traders for food taken on credit over the past two years. Qasido, who is raising her children alone after separation from her husband, said the conflict had compounded hardships already caused by repeated drought. She sees no clear way out of her current situation. Others in the camp are facing similar conditions, like Hawo Ali Adan, a 43-year-old mother of 12, who walked about 40 kilometres from Kuusow to reach the camp in March. For the first time in her life, she has been forced to beg to feed her children. “When the fighting started, we lost everything. Now we cook only what we receive from others, and it is never enough. Life here is very difficult,” she said. Her home, belongings, and four-hectare farm were all burned during the conflict. In the camp, the borehole located three kilometres away sells one jerrycan for 5,000 Somali shillings, forcing her to beg others who can afford the water. She usually gets about 10 litres for her large family. “The biggest problems are water and food. We cannot live without them. We also need shelter and containers to carry water. I have nothing left. Even the clothes I wore were burned,” she said. She had spent $1,500 on planting crops and expected to earn at least $3,000 if rains were good. Even if it became sage to return, rebuilding their farm would require labour and resources, especially as her husband is elderly and unable to work. A committee set up by the Bardale district administration has recorded more than 2,500 families displaced by the conflict so far. The chairman of the committee, Mohamed Malin Mintan, said the clashes had continued for two months, spreading to more areas and forcing more families to flee. He warned that conditions in the camps were deteriorating, with no aid reaching those affected, who had already been diminished by the last two years of poor rainfall. “The situation is getting worse. People have lost everything and have not received any aid so far, based on what we have seen during our assessments,” he said. Source: Ergo The post Clan conflict causes hundreds of families to flee burnt farms in Bay region appeared first on WardheerNews .
